## 1. йҺҪжЁҝоӣҰ

иӨ°ж’іеў йҚ—жҘҖжӮңйҺәгғҘеҪӣж¶“еәЎе”ҙй–®г„Ҙз–„йҗңжӢҢвӮ¬п№ҖжӮҺжқҲеҶ©з№Ғй”ӣж°«йӘҮйҚқдҪәз•»еЁүжӣһоҶҗйҸ„ж’¶жҲ·йҺө?`ModuleAlgImpl` йҺҙж ЁзҘҙз’ҮжӣһзҶҖз»«?`ConstraintAlgImplTestBase`й”ӣеұҪиӢҹйҗ©еӯҳеёҙжөЈи·Ёж•Ө `AlgCPModel`йҠҶдҪёе”ҙй–®г„ҘеҪүй–Іеҝ“оҮ®з’һВ°вӮ¬д№ЈModuleInstAccessorImpl` з»ӣеӨҠз–„йҗңжү®иў«йҚЁе¬ЁвӮ¬еӮҷз«ҙйҸғп№Җзҙ©йҺҝеәЎе”ҙй–®г„ҘеҪүй–Іеҝ”ДҒйҚЁе¬ЁвӮ¬дҪ№зң°з‘ҷпҪ…ж«’зҒҸдҪҪо—ҠйҺҙж ЁеўҪзҗӣеұҫзҘҰз»Ӣе¬ӯзҡҹйҸҒиҫҫзҙқз» жҘҒзЎ¶йҚ’и·әжҗ§зҒҸеҚһеҪІй‘іи—үеҡӯйҗңжү®зҙӘз’ҮжҲқгҒ‘з’җгғЈвӮ¬дҪәиў«йҚ”зҠәжөҮжҫ¶иҫ«и§ҰйҺҙж ¬з№Қзҗӣеұҫж№Ўй–ҝж¬’оҮӨйҠҶ?
йҸҲ?RFC йҺ»ж„ҜоҶ…йҸӮжқҝо–ғз»ӢеҶІз•ҫйҗЁ?`southinf` APIй”ӣеұҫж§‘зәӯоҶ»йӘҮйҚқдҪәз•»еЁүжӣһеҪ§й‘іжҲ’з··з’§ж §еҙЎйҚҡжҲһеёҙйҚҷпҪғвӮ¬дҪәЗ”зҖ№ж°¬еҪүй–І?facadeйҠҶдҪёзҡҜй–Іеҝ“еҺ‘з’Ғе“Ҙж®‘йҚ©иҷ№о”…е§№еӮқР’з»«иҜІзҖ·йҚңеұҪеҙҹж¶“оҒҲеҺӨзјғоҶҝР’ viewйҠҶеӮҡзҙ©йҺҝеәЎе”ҙй–®г„Ҙз–„йҗңйўҒзІӣйҚҷоҲңжҲ·зјҒо…ҹзҙЁжқ©ж¶ізҙқжөЈе—•з¬үй‘іжҲ’з¶”ж¶“иҪ°йӘҮйҚқдҪәз•»еЁүжӣ ж®‘жҝӮжҲ е®ійҠҶ?
йҚ–жҘҖжӮңз’ӢеҶӘж•ӨйҸӮз‘°оӣ§жөЈжӣЎоҮ¬е§№еӮқо…ёз» жӨјвӮ¬дҪёејҪйҺәг„ЈвӮ¬дҪёжӮ—зјғоҶҝо…ёз» жҘӢзҙқйҗў?`RFC-0006` йҚ—жӣ е«ӯзҖ№ж°«з®ҹйҠҶ?

## 2. йҚ”г„ҰжәҖ

### 2.1 й—ӮоҮҖо•Ҫй‘іеұҫж«ҷ

иӨ°ж’іеў жө пҪҮзҲңж¶“о…һеҙЎйҚҡжҲЈз«ҹйҗЈеұјз¬үеЁ“е‘®ж«ҡй”ӣ?

        model().greaterOrEqual(cpu1.quantity(), 1);
        model().compatibilityRequire("rule1", size.option("large"), cpu1.selected());
    }
}

> **йҸӢдҪәз•қйҚҳзҶ·еһҜ**й”ӣж°¬оӣ§йҸӢж»Җз¬үйҸ„оҲҡз¶ӢйҚ“е¶…е§ӣй‘іи—үеҸ§еЁүг„§ж®‘й”ӣеұҪж°Ёж¶“е¶ҲоӣҰйҸӢеӢ«зј“йҠҶ?

| йҸӢеӢ«зј“жӨӨ?| йҚҸиҷ«ж•һйҗҗ?| й—ҲзӮІеҸ§еЁүг„§еҒЈй”ӣе ңз¬үз‘•дҪ№зҖҜеҜӨзҢҙзҙҡ |

| Part | иӨ°ж’іеў йҚ”зҶ»е…ҳеЁ‘еӨҠеј·йҗЁеӢҜе„ҙжө ?| йҚҸжңөзІ¬й–®г„Өж¬ў |
| Para | иӨ°ж’іеў йҚ”зҶ»е…ҳеЁ‘еӨҠеј·йҗЁеӢ«еј¬йҸҒ?| йҚҸжңөзІ¬йҚҷеӮӣжҡҹ |

| зҒһзӮҙвӮ¬СҮвӮ¬еӨҗгҖҚ | иӨ°ж’іеў йҚ”зҶ»е…ҳй—ҮвӮ¬з‘•дҪәж®‘й–«еӨҗгҖҚ | йҚҸжңөзІ¬й–«еӨҗгҖҚ |

    @CodeRuleAnno(fatherCode = "drive", normalNaturalCode = "ж¶“ж°¬е§ҹз‘ҷеӢ«еһҜйҺ»еҝ
... (truncated)

Output:
# CLAUDE.md

This file provides guidance to Claude Code (claude.ai/code) when working with code in this repository.

## Build & Test Commands

```bash
# Build (Java 21, Maven 3.6+)
mvn clean compile

# Run all tests
mvn test

# Run a specific test class
mvn test -Dtest=FilterExpressionExecutorTest

# Run a specific test method
mvn test -Dtest=CalculateRuleIfThenTest#testCalculateRule

# Run with exec plugin
mvn exec:java -Dexec.mainClass="com.jmix.configengine.Main"
```

Lombok is used throughout йҲҘ?ensure annotation processing is enabled in your IDE. Checkstyle config exists at `checkstyle.xml` but is commented out in `pom.xml`.

## Architecture

This is a **constraint-based configuration engine** that uses Google OR-Tools (CP-SAT solver) to reason about product configurations. The system models products as Modules with Params, Parts, and Rules, then uses the CP-SAT solver to find valid configurations or infer parameter values.

### Layer Model

```
config data (Module/Para/Part/Rule)
       |
       v
Constraint solver (OR-Tools CP-SAT wrapper)
       |
       v
Solution enumeration (ModuleInst/ParaInst/PartInst)
```

### Package Structure

**`com.jmix.executor`** йҲҘ?Runtime constraint solving engine:
- `bmodel/` йҲҘ?Business domain model: `Module`, `ModuleBase`, `Para`, `Part`, `PartCategory`, `Rule`, and rule schemas (`CompatiableRuleSchema`, `CalculateRuleSchema`, `CodeRuleSchema`, `PriorityRuleSchema`). `ModuleBase` extends `Onto` and serves as the common base for both `Module` and `PartCategory` (they share the same structure of params + parts + rules).
- `cmodel/` йҲҘ?Configuration instance model: `ModuleInst`, `ParaInst`, `PartInst`, `SolverResult` йҲҘ?these represent solver output, not input.
- `impl/algmodel/` йҲҘ?OR-Tools CP-SAT wrapper: `AlgCPModel`, `AlgCPConstraint`, `AlgCPLinearExpr`, plus variable types (`ParaVar`, `PartVar`, `PartCategoryVar`, `RelaxVar`). `ModuleAlgImpl` extends `ModuleBaseAlgImpl` and is the key class that builds CP-SAT constraints from Module data.
- `southinf/` йҲҘ?"Southbound interfaces" that generated code implements: `IModuleAlg`, `IConstraintFunction`, `IPartCategoryFunction`.
- `ModuleConstraintExecutor` йҲҘ?Singleton entry point (via `INST` field). Only interface external callers should use. Provides `init/fini/addModule/removeModule/inferParas/registerExtensible`.
- `ModuleConstraintExecutorImpl` йҲҘ?Implementation with priority-based layered solving, incremental model loading, and conflict detection via relax variables.

**`com.jmix.tool`** йҲҘ?Code generation tooling:
- `artbuilder/ModuleAlgArtifactGenerator` йҲҘ?Uses FreeMarker to generate Java constraint code from Module definitions using `ModuleConstraintTemplate.ftl`.
- `bbuilder/ModuleGenneratorByAnno` йҲҘ?Builds `Module` instances from annotation-decorated classes at runtime.
- `impl/ModuleGenerator` йҲҘ?LLM-based code generation (via Spring AI).
- `impl/ModulePacker` / `ModuleCompiler` / `ModuleRunner` йҲҘ?Dynamic compilation and execution pipeline.

### Key Patterns

- **Annotation-driven module definition in tests**: Use `@ModuleAnno`, `@ParaAnno`, `@PartAnno`, `@CodeRuleAnno`, `@CompatiableRuleAnno`, `@PriorityRuleAnno` on a class extending `ConstraintAlgImplTestBase`. These annotations auto-generate the `Module` object.
- **Test base classes**: `ModuleScenarioTestBase` for integration tests (full init йҲ«?solve йҲ«?assert pipeline), `ConstraintAlgImplTestBase` for constraint algorithm definition.
- **PartCategory** shares the same structure as Module (extends `ModuleBase`), supporting nested constraint hierarchies and multi-instance (MultiInstPartCategory) scenarios.
- **Solver supports**: single solution, all solutions enumeration (`enumerateAllSolution`), priority-layered solving, and conflict detection via relax variables.

## Code Style

- **Log messages MUST be in English** йҲҘ?this is a hard rule from `.cursorrules`. Use `log.info("User authentication successful")` not `log.info("йҗўг„Ұеҹӣз’ҒгӮҲзҳүйҺҙж„¬е§ӣ")`.
- **Comments may use Chinese** йҲҘ?JavaDoc and inline comments can use Chinese for explaining complex business logic.
- Communication with this user should be in simplified Chinese.
- Java source level: 21. Max line length: 120 (per `checkstyle.xml` and `CodeFormatterFromIdea.xml`).
- Use Lombok (`@Data`, `@Slf4j`, `@EqualsAndHashCode`) for boilerplate reduction.
```

 * з’җзҶ»зҹ—йҚ”г„ҰвӮ¬дҪёе§һжқһи—үжӢ°зҖ№зӮ°з·ҘйҚ–ж «е®ійҸүзҶәз•»еЁүжӣ иў«
 * 
 * @since 2025-09-22
 */
@Slf4j
public class ModuleAlgClassLoader extends ClassLoader {
    /**
     * з»ҫпёҪжҪ«йҺөСҶо”‘й–°е¶Үз–Ҷй”ӣеұҪе–…зҖ№ж°ізҡҹз’ҮжӣҹДҒеҜ®еҝҺз¬ҢйҸҚеңӯжҙ°иӨ°жӣ з“‘йҚ”зҠәжөҮзҗӣеұјиҙҹ
     */
    private ConstraintConfig config;

    /**
     * з»ҫпёҪжҪ«з‘ҷеӢ«еһҜз»«иҚӨж®‘зҖ№еұҫжҡЈй—„ж„¬з•ҫйҚҡе¶ҸзҙҷйҚҷоҲқе…ҳйҚ–е‘ӯжғҲйҚҗе‘ҙе„ҙз»«иҜІеһҺй—…ж—ӮоғҒ $й”ӣ?
     */
    private String constraintRuleClassName;

    /**
     * е®ёжҸ’е§һжқһз•Ңж®‘з»«иҚӨзҙҰзҖӣжЁ»ж§§зҒҸеӢ¶зҙҷз»«иҜІжӮ• -> Class зҖөзЎ…и–„й”ӣ?
     */
    private final Map<String, Class<?>> classMap = new HashMap<>();

    /**
     * еҰҜвҖіжҪЎз» жҘҒзЎ¶йҚ’и·әжҗ§йҺ»еҝҡе Әй”ӣе қеҜҳйҚҡоӮўеҜҳйҚҡе¶ғвӮ¬дҪ№ДҒйҚ§жҘғзҲңйҠҶдҪәеҹ—з»«иҜІжӮ•з»ӣеӨӣзҙҡ
     */
    private ModuleAlgArtifact algArtifact;

    /**
     * йҗўг„Өз°¬йҚ”зҠәжөҮ jar ж¶“о… иў«йҗЁ?URLClassLoader зҖ№зӮ°з·Ҙ
     */
    private URLClassLoader jarClassLoader;

    public ModuleAlgClassLoader(ConstraintConfig config, ModuleAlgArtifact algArtifact) {
        this.config = config;
        this.algArtifact = algArtifact;
    }

    /**
     * йҚ’жҝҶоқҗйҚ–ж ЁДҒйҚ§жҘғз•»еЁүжӣ иў«йҚ”зҠәжөҮйҚЈ?
     */
    public void init() {
        // йҸӢеӢ«зј“зҖ№еұҫжҡЈйҗЁеӢӯиў«йҚҡе¶ҸзҙқйҸҖоҲӣеҜ”йҚҗе‘ҙе„ҙз»«иҜІжәҖйҸ…?
        this.constraintRuleClassName = toFullConstraintClassName(algArtifact);

        // жҝЎеӮӣзҒүisAttachedDebug=falseй”ӣеұјзІ rootFilePathз’ҮиҜІеҪҮclassж·Үв„ғдј…
        if (!config.isAttachedDebug()) {
            loadClassFromJar();
        } else {
            loadClassFromLocalProject();
        }
    }

    /**
     * жө еәўж№°йҚҰжӢҢзҡҹз’ҮжӣўгҖҚйҗ©оҶ»и…‘йҚ”зҠәжөҮclassж·Үв„ғдј…
     */
    private void loadClassFromLocalProject() {
        Class<?> clazz = null;
        try {
            clazz = super.loadClass(this.constraintRuleClassName);
            log.info("Loaded class from local project: {}", constraintRuleClassName);
        } catch (ClassNotFoundException e) {
            log.error("Class not found: {}", constraintRuleClassName, e);
            throw new AlgLoaderException("Class not found: " + constraintRuleClassName, e);
        }
        if (clazz != null) {
            classMap.put(constraintRuleClassName, clazz);
        } else {
            log.error("Class not found: clazz=null {}", constraintRuleClassName);
            throw new AlgLoaderException("Class not found: clazz=null " + constraintRuleClassName);
        }
    }

    /**

        // йҸӢеӢ«зј“еҰҜвҖіжҪЎйҸӮеӣҰж¬ўйҗ©оҶјз¶Қз’әоҲҡз·һйҚңе®©arйҸӮеӣҰж¬ўз’әоҲҡз·һ
        String classJarFile = algArtifact.getRuntimeJarPath(config.getRootFilePath());

        Path jarPath = Paths.get(classJarFile);
        if (!Files.exists(jarPath)) {
            log.error("Jar file not found: {}", classJarFile);
            throw new AlgLoaderException("Jar file not found: " + classJarFile);
        }

        // йҚ’ж¶ҳзј“URLClassLoaderйҚ”зҠәжөҮjarйҚ–?
        URL jarUrl = null;
        try {
            jarUrl = jarPath.toUri().toURL();
        } catch (MalformedURLException e) {
            log.error("Failed to initialize jar class loader", e);
            throw new AlgLoaderException("Failed to initialize jar class loader: " + e.getMessage(), e);
        }
        jarClassLoader = new URLClassLoader(new URL[] { jarUrl }, this.getClass().getClassLoader());

        // жЈ°еӢ«е§һжқһиҠҘеўҚйҸҲеЎ©lassйҸӮеӣҰж¬ў
        preloadClassesFromJar(classJarFile);

    public static final String SOURCE_JAR_PATTERN = "cp-%s-%s-sources.jar";

    /**
     * йҚ©иҷ№о”…йҸҒзүҲеөҒйҸӮеӣҰж¬ўйҚӣи—үжӮ•еҰҜвҖізҙЎй”ӣжӯқp-{moduleCode}-{moduleId}.base.json
     */
    public static final String BASE_JSON_PATTERN = "cp-%s-%s.base.json";

    /**
     * з» жҘҒзЎ¶йҚ’и·әжҗ§ID
     */
    private Long id;

    /**
     * еҰҜвҖіжҪЎжө пҪҮзҲң
     */
    private String moduleCode;

    /**
     * з» жҘҒзЎ¶йҚ’и·әжҗ§йҚ–е‘ӯжӮ•й”ӣеұјз·ҘжҝЎеӮҰзҙ°TShirtConstraint.jar
     */
    private String fileName;

    /**
     * з» жҘҒзЎ¶йҚ’и·әжҗ§йҚ©иҷ№о”…йҚ–е‘ӯжӮ•
     */
    private String packageName;

    /**
     * йҗ–еүҒиў«йҚҡе¶ҮРһй”ӣеІҖж•ӨжөңеәЎе”ҙй–®г„§иў«йҚҰзғҳж«ҷй”ӣеІ„зІҜз’ҒгӮ„иҙҹз»Ңе“„з“§з»—пёҝиҰҶ

     */
    private String parentClassName = "";

    /**
     * й‘ҫеі°еҪҮеҰҜвҖіжҪЎйҗ©оҶјз¶ҚйҚҡе¶ҮРһ
     * 
     * @return еҰҜвҖіжҪЎйҗ©оҶјз¶ҚйҚҡе¶ҮРһй”ӣеұҫзүёеҜ®еҝҘзҙ°cp-{moduleCode}-{moduleId}
     */
    @JsonIgnore
    public String getModuleDirName() {
        return String.format(MODULE_DIR_PATTERN, moduleCode, id);
    }

    /**
     * й‘ҫеі°еҪҮжқ©ж„Ҝо”‘jarйҚ–е‘®жһғжө и·әжӮ•

     */
    @JsonIgnore
    public String getRuntimeJarFileName() {
        return String.format(RUNTIME_JAR_PATTERN, moduleCode, id);
    }

    /**
     * й‘ҫеі°еҪҮе©§ж„®зҲңjarйҚ–е‘®жһғжө и·әжӮ•
     * 
     * @return е©§ж„®зҲңjarйҚ–е‘®жһғжө и·әжӮ•й”ӣеұҫзүёеҜ®еҝҘзҙ°cp-{moduleCode}-{moduleId}-sources.jar
     */
    @JsonIgnore
    public String getSourceJarFileName() {
        return String.format(SOURCE_JAR_PATTERN, moduleCode, id);
    }

    /**

package com.jmix.scenario.hello;

import com.jmix.coretest.ModuleScenarioTestBase;
import com.jmix.executor.model.ConstraintConfig;

import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;

import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;

/**
 * Helloз»ҫпёҪжҪ«з» жҘҒзЎ¶еЁҙе¬ӯзҳҜз»«?
 * 
 * @since 2025-09-23
 */
@Slf4j
public class HelloConstraintTest extends ModuleScenarioTestBase {

    /**
     * йҸӢеӢҜвӮ¬зҮһelloConstraintTestеЁҙе¬ӯзҳҜз»«?
     */
    public HelloConstraintTest() {
        super(HelloConstraint.class);
    }

    @Override
    protected void beforeInitConfig(ConstraintConfig cfg) {
        cfg.setLoadType(ConstraintConfig.LOAD_TYPE_FULL);
        cfg.setLoadType(ConstraintConfig.LOAD_TYPE_FULL);
    }

    /**
     * еЁҙе¬ӯзҳҜйҚҷоҒ…ж№Ғж¶“вӮ¬ж¶“оҒҮР’йҗЁеӢ¬е„ҸйҚҗ?
     */
    @Test
    public void testOnlyOneSolution() {
        // еЁҙе¬ӯзҳҜжЈ°ж»ҶеЈҠйҚҷеӮӣжҡҹйҺәг„§жӮҠ
        inferParas("tShirt11", 1);

        // жҘ еІғзҳүз»—оғҝз«ҙж¶“оҒҮР’
        solutions(0).assertPara("color").valueEqual("Red")
                .assertPara("size").valueEqual("Small");
        printSolutions();
    }

    /**
     * еЁҙе¬ӯзҳҜжҫ¶ж°іР’йҺҜе‘ӯе–Ң
     */
    @Test
    public void testMultiSolution() {
        // "Red-10", "Black-20", "White-30"
        // "Small-10", "Medium-20", "Big-30"
        // if(colorVar.value ==Red && sizeVar.value == Small ) {
        // tShirt11Var.qty = 1;
        // }
        // else {
        // tShirt11Var.qty = 3
        // }
        // еЁҙе¬ӯзҳҜжЈ°ж»ҶеЈҠйҚҷеӮӣжҡҹйҺәг„§жӮҠ
        inferParas("tShirt11", 3);
        printSolutions();
        // йҚҷе¶Ҷеё№йҸҲ?ж¶“оҒ…еёҙйҚҷ?8=3*3 - 1
        resultAssert()
                .assertSuccess()
                .assertSolutionSizeEqual(8);
        // ifйҗЁеӢ®Р’й‘ІоҲҡз•ҫж¶“е¶…ж№ӘйҚҸжңөи…‘
        assertSolutionNum("color:Red,size:Small", 0);
        // elseйҗЁеӢ®Р’йҚҷоҲқе…ҳз‘ҷпҪ…оӣ§ж¶“е¬¶зҙ°
        assertSolutionNum("color:Black,size:Big", 1);
        assertSolutionNum("color:White,size:Medium", 1);
        assertSolutionNum("color:Red,size:Medium", 1);
        assertSolutionNum("color:Black,size:Medium", 1);
        assertSolutionNum("color:White,size:Big", 1);
        assertSolutionNum("color:Red,size:Big", 1);
        assertSolutionNum("color:Black,size:Small", 1);
        printSolutions();
    }

}

package com.jmix.scenario.hello;

import com.jmix.coretest.ConstraintAlgImplTestBase;
import com.jmix.tool.bbuilder.anno.CodeRuleAnno;
import com.jmix.tool.bbuilder.anno.ModuleAnno;
import com.jmix.tool.bbuilder.anno.ParaAnno;
import com.jmix.tool.bbuilder.anno.PartAnno;

import com.google.ortools.sat.BoolVar;
import com.google.ortools.sat.Literal;

/**
 * HelloеҰҜвҖіжҪЎз»ҫпёҪжҪ«з» жҘҒзЎ¶
 * 
 * @since 2025-09-23
 */
@ModuleAnno(id = 123L)
public class HelloConstraint extends ConstraintAlgImplTestBase {

    @ParaAnno(defaultValue = "Red", options = { "Red:1", "Black:2", "White:3" })
    private ParaVar colorVar;

    @ParaAnno(defaultValue = "Small", options = { "Small", "Medium", "Big" })
    private ParaVar sizeVar;

    @PartAnno(price = 100L)
    private PartVar tShirt11Var;

    /**
     * йҸүвҖІж¬ўйҸҒдјҙеҷәз‘ҷеӢ«еһҜй”ӣж°¬зҶҖжөңеәЁо–Ғй‘№жҸ’жӢ°зҒҸе“„оҮӯйҗЁеӢҜе„ҙжө иҲөжҡҹй–ІеҝҡоқүйҚ’?
     * з‘ҷеӢ«еһҜйҚҗе‘ӯоҶҗй”ӣж°¬оӣ§йҸӢж»Ҳо–Ғй‘№жҹҘвӮ¬еӨӢе«Ёз»ҫгҲЈеЈҠж¶“ж–ҝжҳӮзҖөжҗҒвӮ¬еӨӢе«ЁзҒҸеҝ“еҪҝй”ӣеұҪеһҜTShirt11йҸҒдјҙеҷәж¶“?й”ӣж¶ҳжғҒйҚ’ж¬Һиҙҹ3
     */
    @CodeRuleAnno()
    public void addConstraintRule2() {

        // "Red-10", "Black-20", "White-30"
        // "Small-10", "Medium-20", "Big-30"
        // if(colorVar.value ==Red && sizeVar.value == Small ) {
        // tShirt11Var.qty = 1;
        // }
        // else {
        // tShirt11Var.qty = 3
        // }

        // йҚ’ж¶ҳзј“йҸүвҖІж¬ўйҚҷж©Җеҷәй”ӣж°¶о–Ғй‘№еҸүж§ёз»ҫгҲЈеЈҠж¶“ж–ҝжҳӮзҖөе‘Ҡж§ёзҒҸеҝ“еҪҝ
        BoolVar redAndSmall = newBoolVar("rule2_redAndSmall");

        // зҖ№зӮөе№ҮйҸүвҖІж¬ўй–«жҳҸз·«й”ӣжӯіedAndSmall = (Color == Red) AND (Size == Small)
        model.addBoolAnd(new Literal[] {
                this.colorVar.getParaOptionByCode("Red").getIsSelectedVar(),
                this.sizeVar.getParaOptionByCode("Small").getIsSelectedVar()
        }).onlyEnforceIf(redAndSmall);

        // жҝЎеӮӣзҒүж¶“е¶Ҷж§ёз»ҫгҲЈеЈҠж¶“ж–ҝзҡ¬йҚҷйЈҺж®‘зјҒеӢ«жӮҺй”ӣеұҪеһҜredAndSmallж¶“зҜәalse
        model.addBoolOr(new Literal[] {
                this.colorVar.getParaOptionByCode("Red").getIsSelectedVar().not(),
                this.sizeVar.getParaOptionByCode("Small").getIsSelectedVar().not()
        }).onlyEnforceIf(redAndSmall.not());

        // йҸҚи§„еөҒйҸүвҖІж¬ўз’Ғеү§з–ҶTShirt11йҗЁеӢ¬жҡҹй–І?
        // жҝЎеӮӣзҒүredAndSmallж¶“з°Қrueй”ӣеұҪеһҜTShirt11йҸҒдјҙеҷәж¶“?
        model.addEquality(this.tShirt11Var.qty, 1).onlyEnforceIf(redAndSmall);

        // жҝЎеӮӣзҒүredAndSmallж¶“зҜәalseй”ӣеұҪеһҜTShirt11йҸҒдјҙеҷәж¶“?
        model.addEquality(this.tShirt11Var.qty, 3).onlyEnforceIf(redAndSmall.not());
    }
}
```
</details></tool-use>

package com.jmix.scenario.hello;

import static org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertEquals;
import static org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertNotNull;

import com.jmix.executor.ModuleConstraintExecutor;
import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.Module;
import com.jmix.executor.impl.util.CommHelper;
import com.jmix.executor.model.ConstraintConfig;
import com.jmix.executor.model.InferParasReq;
import com.jmix.executor.cmodel.ModuleInst;
import com.jmix.executor.cmodel.ParaInst;
import com.jmix.executor.cmodel.PartInst;
import com.jmix.executor.model.Result;
import com.jmix.tool.bbuilder.ModuleGenneratorByAnno;

import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;

import org.junit.jupiter.api.AfterEach;
import org.junit.jupiter.api.BeforeEach;
import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;

import java.io.File;
import java.util.List;

/**
 * Helloз»ҫпёҪжҪ«з» жҘҒзЎ¶з» вӮ¬йҚ—жӣҹзҘҙз’Үжӣ иў«
 * ж¶“е¶„з··з’§жңҡoduleScenarioTestBaseеҰ—е—ҳзҒҰй”ӣеІҖжҙҝйҺәгғӨеЁҮйҗўвҲ•oduleConstraintExecutor.INSTжқ©ж¶ңо”‘еЁҙе¬ӯзҳҜ
 * 
 * @since 2025-11-15
 */
@Slf4j
public class HelloConstraintSimpleTest {

    private String tempResourcePath;
    private Module module;

    /**
     * еЁҙе¬ӯзҳҜйҚ“е¶…еһөжҝ®е¬ӘеҜІ
     */
    @BeforeEach
    public void setUp() {
        // йҗўзҶёеһҡж¶“еӯҳжӨӮз’§еӢ¬з°®з’әоҲҡз·һ
        tempResourcePath = CommHelper.createTempPath(HelloConstraint.class);

        // йҚ’жҝҶоқҗйҚ–ж ӯеҺӨзјғ?
        ConstraintConfig config = new ConstraintConfig();
        config.setAttachedDebug(true);
        config.setLogFilePath(tempResourcePath);
        config.setLogModelProto(true);
        config.setLoadType(ConstraintConfig.LOAD_TYPE_FULL);

        String rootFilePath = System.getProperty("user.dir") + File.separator + ".." + File.separator + "cproot";
        config.setRootFilePath(rootFilePath);

        // йҚ’жҝҶоқҗйҚ–ж ЁеўҪзҗӣеұҪж«’
        Result<Void> initResult = ModuleConstraintExecutor.INST.init(config);
        assertEquals(Result.SUCCESS, initResult.getCode(),
                "Executor initialization failed: " + initResult.getMessage());

        // йҸӢеӢ«зј“йӘһиҲөеқҠйҚ”зҠіДҒйҚ§?
        module = ModuleGenneratorByAnno.build(HelloConstraint.class, tempResourcePath);
        Result<Void> addModuleResult = ModuleConstraintExecutor.INST.addModule(module.getId(), module);
        assertEquals(Result.SUCCESS, addModuleResult.getCode(),
                "Add module failed: " + addModuleResult.getMessage());

        log.info("Test setup completed, module ID: {}", module.getId());
    }

    /**
     * еЁҙе¬ӯзҳҜйҚҡеәўз«»йҗһ?
     */
    @AfterEach
    public void tearDown() {
        ModuleConstraintExecutor.INST.fini();
        log.info("Test teardown completed");
    }

    /**
     * еЁҙе¬ӯзҳҜйҚҷоҒ…ж№Ғж¶“вӮ¬ж¶“оҒҮР’йҗЁеӢ¬е„ҸйҚҗ?
     * йҚҰзғҳж«ҷй”ӣжӯөShirt11йҸҒдјҙеҷәж¶“?йҸғи®№зҙқжҗҙж—ҮоҮҡйҚҷоҒ…ж№Ғж¶“вӮ¬ж¶“оҒҮР’й”ӣжӯқolor=Red, size=Small
     */
    @Test
    public void testOnlyOneSolution() {
        // йҸӢеӢ«зј“йҚ©иҷ№о”…йҸҒзүҲеөҒ
        // ......
        // йҸӢеӢ«зј“йҺәг„§жӮҠз’Үй”Ӣзң°
        InferParasReq req = new InferParasReq();
        req.setModuleId(module.getId());
        req.setEnumerateAllSolution(false); // йҚҷоҒҮз№‘йҚҘзӮ°з«ҙж¶“оҒҮР’

        // з’Ғеү§з–Ҷж¶“е©ҡе„ҙжө и·әз–„жёҡе¬¶зҙ°tShirt11йҸҒдјҙеҷәж¶“?
        PartInst mainPartInst = new PartInst();
        mainPartInst.setCode("tShirt11");
        mainPartInst.setQuantity(1);
        req.setMainPartInst(mainPartInst);

        // йҺөСҶо”‘йҚҷеӮӣжҡҹйҺәг„§жӮҠ
        Result<List<ModuleInst>> result = ModuleConstraintExecutor.INST.inferParas(req);

        // жҘ еІғзҳүзјҒж’ҙзҒү
        assertEquals(Result.SUCCESS, result.getCode(),
                "Inference failed: " + result.getMessage());
        assertNotNull(result.getData(), "Result data should not be null");
        assertEquals(1, result.getData().size(), "Should have exactly one solution");

        // жҘ еІғзҳүз»—оғҝз«ҙж¶“оҒҮР’йҗЁеӢ«еј¬йҸҒжқҝвӮ¬?

        assertNotNull(solution, "Solution should not be null");

        // жҘ еІғзҳүcolorйҚҷеӮӣжҡҹж¶“зҜҹed

                .filter(p -> "color".equals(p.getCode()))
                .findFirst()
                .orElse(null);

                .findFirst()
                .orElse(null);

     */
    static public class ParaVar extends Var<Para> {

        /**
         * йҚҷеӮӣжҡҹйҚҠиӮ©е§ёйҺ¬?
         */
        public IntVar value;

        /**
         * йҚҸз…ҺоҶҗйҸғС„ДҒйҚЁе¬¬ж®‘й—…ж„ҜжЈҢз”ҜеҶЁзҡөйҚҷж©Җеҷә
         * 0-йҸ„еү§гҒҡй”ӣ?-й—…ж„ҜжЈҢ
         */
        public BoolVar isHidden;

        /**
         * йҚҷеӮӣжҡҹйҚҷоҲһвӮ¬еӨҠвӮ¬иӮ©ж®‘й–«еӨүи…‘йҗҳиҲөвӮ¬?CodeId -> ParaOptionVar)
         */
        public Map<Integer, ParaOptionVar> optionSelectVars = new HashMap<>();

        /**
         * йҸҚи§„еөҒжө пҪҮзҲңIDй‘ҫеі°еҪҮйҚҷеӮӣжҡҹй–«еӨҗгҖҚйҚҷж©Җеҷә
         * 
         * @param codeId й–«еӨҗгҖҚйҗЁеӢӘе”¬йҗ®дёЎD
         * @return зҖөз‘°з°ІйҗЁеӢ«еј¬йҸҒдјҙвӮ¬еӨҗгҖҚйҚҷж©Җеҷәй”ӣеұҪоӣ§йҸӢж»Җз¬үзҖӣжЁәж№ӘйҚ’ж¬’з№‘йҚҘзҖ—ull
         */
        public ParaOptionVar getParaOptionByCodeId(Integer codeId) {
            return optionSelectVars.get(codeId);
        }

        /**
         * йҸҚи§„еөҒжө пҪҮзҲңй‘ҫеі°еҪҮйҚҷеӮӣжҡҹй–«еӨҗгҖҚйҚҷж©Җеҷә
         * 
         * @param code й–«еӨҗгҖҚйҗЁеӢӘе”¬йҗ®?
         * @return зҖөз‘°з°ІйҗЁеӢ«еј¬йҸҒдјҙвӮ¬еӨҗгҖҚйҚҷж©Җеҷә
         * @throws AlgLoaderException жҝЎеӮӣзҒүйҺөеҸҘз¬үйҚ’жқҝоҮ®жҗҙж—Ӯж®‘й–«еӨҗгҖҚ
         */
        public ParaOptionVar getParaOptionByCode(String code) {
            for (ParaOptionVar option : optionSelectVars.values()) {
                if (code != null && code.equals(option.getCode())) {
                    return option;
                }
            }
            throw new AlgLoaderException("ParaOptionVar not found for code: " + code);
        }

        /**

            return internal != null ? internal.getInputValue() : null;
        }

        public Boolean getIsHasInputed() {
            return internal != null ? internal.getHasInputed() : Boolean.FALSE;
        }

        public void setIsHasInputed(Boolean hasInputed) {
            if (internal != null) {
                internal.setHasInputed(hasInputed);
            }
        }
    }

package ${module.packageName};

import com.jmix.configengine.artifact.*;
import com.google.ortools.sat.*;
import java.util.*;

/**
 * й‘·оҒ„е§©йҗўзҶёеһҡйҗЁеӢӯе®ійҸүзҶәиў«й”ӣ?{module.code}Constraint
 */
public class ${module.code}Constraint extends ConstraintAlgImpl {
    
    <#--йҚҷеӮӣжҡҹйҚҷж©Җеҷәжҫ№зүҲж§‘ -->
    <#list module.paras as para>
    private ParaVar ${para.varName};
    </#list>
    
    <#--PartйҚҷж©Җеҷәжҫ№зүҲж§‘ -->
    <#list module.parts as part>
    private PartVar ${part.varName};
    </#list>

    @Override
    public void initVariables() {
        //йҚҷеӮӣжҡҹйҚ’ж¶ҳзј“
        <#list module.paras as para>
            //йҚҷеӮӣжҡҹ${para.code}йҚ’ж¶ҳзј“
            this.${para.varName} = createParaVar("${para.code}");
        </#list>
        
        //й–®г„Өж¬ўйҚ’ж¶ҳзј“
        <#list module.parts as part>
            //й–®г„Өж¬ў${part.code}йҚ’ж¶ҳзј“
            this.${part.varName} = createPartVar("${part.code}");
        </#list>
    }

    @Override
    public void initConstraint() {
        // жқ©ж¬“еҷ·жҗҙж—ҮоҮҡйҚ’жҝҶоқҗйҚ–ж «е®ійҸүзҮӮзҙқзҖ№зӮәжӘҜзҖ№зӮөе№Үж¶“о…ўжё¶з‘•дёҶPModel
        <#list module.rules as rule>
        addConstraint_${rule.code}();
        </#list>
    }
    
    <#--йҗўзҶёеһҡз»ҫпёҪжҪ«зҖ№ж°«з®ҹ -->
    <#list module.rules as rule>
        //===================================з’ӢеҶӯзҳҜж·Үв„ғдј…===================================
        // з‘ҷеӢ«еһҜ: ${rule.code} - ${rule.name}
        // isCompatibleRule(): ${rule.isCompatibleRule()?string}
        // rule.left??: ${(rule.left??)?string}
        // rule.right??: ${(rule.right??)?string}
        // йҸүвҖІж¬ўйҚ’гӮҶжҹҮзјҒж’ҙзҒү: ${(rule.isCompatibleRule() && rule.left?? && rule.right??)?string}
        //===================================з’ӢеҶӯзҳҜж·Үв„ғдј…===================================
        
        <#if rule.isCompatibleRule() && rule.left?? && rule.right??>
        //===================================з»«иҜІзҖ·1===================================
    /**
     * йҚҸз…ҺоҶҗйҺ¬СҶоқүйҚ’ж¬ҷзҙ°${rule.name}
     * з‘ҷеӢ«еһҜйҚҗе‘ӯоҶҗй”ӣ?{rule.normalNaturalCode}
     */
    public void addConstraint_${rule.code}() {
        addCompatibleConstraint("${rule.code}", this.${rule.left.varName},
        Arrays.asList(
                <#list rule.rightFilterCodes as filterCode>
                    "${filterCode}"<#if filterCode_has_next>,</#if>
                </#list>
        ), this.${rule.right.varName}, Arrays.asList(
                <#list rule.leftFilterCodes as filterCode>
                    "${filterCode}"<#if filterCode_has_next>,</#if>
                </#list>
        ));
    }
    /**
     * йҚҸз…ҺоҶҗйҺ¬СҶоқүйҚ’ж¬ҷзҙ°${rule.name}
     * з‘ҷеӢ«еһҜйҚҗе‘ӯоҶҗй”ӣ?{rule.normalNaturalCode}
     */
    public void addConstraint_${rule.code}_comment() { 
            // left:зәӯоҶ»з№ҡйҚҷоҒ…ж№Ғж¶“вӮ¬ж¶“оҒҲо–Ғй‘№жҹҘвӮ¬еӨҗгҖҚзҗҡоӮҰвӮ¬еӨүи…‘,partз‘•дҪҪвӮ¬еҶӯжӘ»TODO
            model.addExactlyOne(this.${rule.left.varName}.optionSelectVars.values().stream()
                .map(option -> option.getIsSelectedVar())
                .toArray(BoolVar[]::new));

            model.addExactlyOne(this.${rule.right.varName}.optionSelectVars.values().stream()
                .map(option -> option.getIsSelectedVar())
                .toArray(BoolVar[]::new));

            // 4. зҖ№ж°«з®ҹз»ӣж¶ўвӮ¬еӨҠжӮ—йҗЁеӢҜжіҰйҚҡ?Set1=(A1,A2,A3) =>з»ӣж¶ҳеҡӯйҗЁеӢӯзІЁйҸӢж·Һ1й”ӣеӯү2 (filterCodeIds)
            // е®ёп№ҒгҖғжқҲжғ§зҙЎй”ӣж°¬оҮ®Color.optionsйҺөСҶо”‘filter("Color !="Red")йҗЁеӢӯзІЁйҸӢж»Җиҙҹй”ӣ?Black=10, White=20)

package com.jmix.executor.impl;

import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.Module;
import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.logic.CalcStage;
import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.logic.Rule;
import com.jmix.executor.cmodel.ModuleInst;
import com.jmix.executor.impl.algmodel.ModuleAlgImpl;
import com.jmix.executor.model.AlgLoaderException;
import com.jmix.executor.model.Result;

import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;

import java.lang.reflect.InvocationTargetException;
import java.lang.reflect.Method;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.LinkedHashMap;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;

/**
 * еҰҜвҖіжҪЎйҚҡеәЈз–Ҷз’Ғпј„з•»йҚЈ?
 * йҚҰвҖ“P-SATе§№еӮқР’зҖ№еұҫеһҡйҚҡеәЎоҮ®е§ЈеҝҺйҮңModuleInstйҺөСҶо”‘CalcStage.POSTз‘ҷеӢ«еһҜ
 *
 * @since 2026-05-03
 */
@Slf4j
public class ModulePostCalculator {

    private final Module module;
    private final ModuleAlgImpl moduleAlg;
    private final List<PostRuleMethod> postRuleMethods;

    public ModulePostCalculator(Module module, ModuleAlgImpl moduleAlg) {
        this.module = module;
        this.moduleAlg = moduleAlg;
        this.postRuleMethods = scanPostRuleMethods();
    }

    /**
     * зҖөзЎ…Р’йҚ’жҘ„гҖғйҺөеҪ’еҷәйҺөСҶо”‘POSTз‘ҷеӢ«еһҜ
     *
     * @param solutions CPе§№еӮқР’жөңС…ж•“йҗЁеӢ®Р’йҚ’жҘ„гҖғ
     * @return йҚҗж¬ҸеҸҶеЁІеү§ж•“йҚҷеӮӣжҡҹйҚҡеәЈж®‘зјҒж’ҙзҒү
     */
    public Result<List<ModuleInst>> doCalc(List<ModuleInst> solutions) {
        if (solutions == null || solutions.isEmpty()) {
            return Result.success(solutions);
        }
        if (postRuleMethods.isEmpty()) {
            return Result.success(solutions);
        }

        for (int i = 0; i < solutions.size(); i++) {
            ModuleInst solution = solutions.get(i);
            ModuleInstAccessor accessor = new ModuleInstAccessorImpl(module, solution);
            moduleAlg.bindModuleInstAccessor(accessor);
            try {
                for (PostRuleMethod prm : postRuleMethods) {
                    invokePostRule(prm, i + 1);
                }
            } catch (RuntimeException ex) {
                return Result.failed("POST rule failed, solutionIndex=" + (i + 1)
                        + ", message=" + ex.getMessage());
            } finally {
                moduleAlg.clearModuleInstAccessor();
            }
        }
        return Result.success(solutions);
    }

    private void invokePostRule(PostRuleMethod prm, int solutionIndex) {
        try {
            prm.method.setAccessible(true);
            prm.method.invoke(moduleAlg);
            log.info("Executed POST rule: {} for solution {}", prm.rule.getCode(), solutionIndex);
        } catch (IllegalAccessException e) {
            throw new AlgLoaderException(
                    "Failed to access POST rule method: " + prm.method.getName(), e);
        } catch (InvocationTargetException e) {
            Throwable cause = e.getCause() != null ? e.getCause() : e;
            throw new AlgLoaderException(
                    "POST rule failed: ruleCode=" + prm.rule.getCode()
                            + ", method=" + prm.method.getName()
                            + ", solutionIndex=" + solutionIndex
                            + ", message=" + cause.getMessage(), cause);
        }
    }

    /**
     * йҺөоӮЈејҝйҺөвӮ¬йҸҲеЎ’OSTз‘ҷеӢ«еһҜйӘһи·әзј“з»”е©»uleйҲ«жүўethodйҸ„зҠІзҡ 
     */
    private List<PostRuleMethod> scanPostRuleMethods() {
        List<Rule> postRules = module.getAllRules(CalcStage.POST);
        if (postRules == null || postRules.isEmpty()) {
            return new ArrayList<>();
        }

        Map<String, Method> allRuleMethods = buildAllRuleMethods();
        List<PostRuleMethod> result = new ArrayList<>();

        for (Rule rule : postRules) {
            Method method = allRuleMethods.get(rule.getCode());
            if (method == null) {
                throw new AlgLoaderException(
                        "POST rule method not found for rule code: " + rule.getCode()
                                + " in class " + moduleAlg.getClass().getName());
            }
            result.add(new PostRuleMethod(rule, method));
            log.info("Scanned POST rule: {} -> {}", rule.getCode(), method.getName());
        }

        log.info("Scanned {} POST rule methods", result.size());
        return result;
    }

    private Map<String, Method> buildAllRuleMethods() {
        Method[] methods = moduleAlg.getClass().getDeclaredMethods();
        Map<String, Method> allMethods = new HashMap<>();
        for (Method method : methods) {
            allMethods.put(method.getName(), method);
        }
        Map<String, Method> ruleMethods = new LinkedHashMap<>();
        for (Rule rule : module.getAllRules()) {
            Method method = allMethods.get(rule.getCode());
            if (method != null) {
                ru

        String rootPath = CommHelper.getTestResourcePath() + File.separator + "algroot";
        String moduleDirPath = rootPath + File.separator
                + String.format(ModuleAlgArtifact.MODULE_DIR_PATTERN, moduleCode, moduleId);
        String moduleJsonFile = String.format(ModuleAlgArtifact.BASE_JSON_PATTERN, moduleCode, moduleId);

        // йҚ’жҝҶоқҗйҚ–ж ЁеўҪзҗӣеұҪж«’
        ConstraintConfig config = new ConstraintConfig();
        config.setRootFilePath(rootPath);
        ModuleConstraintExecutor.INST.init(config);

        // йҚ’жҝҶоқҗйҚ–жңҡoduleйҸҒзүҲеөҒ
        Module module = ModuleUtils.fromJsonFile(moduleDirPath + File.separator + moduleJsonFile);
        ModuleConstraintExecutor.INST.addModule(moduleId, module);

        // йҺәг„§жӮҠйҚҷеӮӣжҡҹ inferParas("tShirt11", 1);
        InferParasReq req = new InferParasReq();
        req.setModuleId(moduleId);
        req.setMainPartInst(new PartInst("tShirt11", 1));
        Result<List<ModuleInst>> result = ModuleConstraintExecutor.INST.inferParas(req);

        // зјҒж’ҙзҒүжҫ¶еӢӯжӮҠ
        log.info("result: {}", result);
        ModuleInst solution = result.getData().get(0);
        ParaInst colorInst = solution.getParas().get(0);
        ParaInst sizeInst = solution.getParas().get(1);
        assertEquals(colorInst.getValue(), "1"); // "Red"
        assertEquals(sizeInst.getValue(), "10"); // "Small"
    }

}

    protected void executeRuleMethod(Rule rule, IModuleAlg moduleAlgFile, Method method) {

    private boolean isOneManyRule(Rule rule) {
        return rule.getLeftCardinality() == Cardinality.ONE && rule.getRightCardinality() == Cardinality.MANY;
    }

    private void executeRuleMethod4OneManyRule(Rule rule, IModuleAlg moduleAlgFile, Method method) {
        String leftPartCategoryCode = rule.getLeftCategoryCode();
        String rightPartCategoryCode = rule.getRightCategoryCode();
        if (Strings.isEmpty(leftPartCategoryCode) || Strings.isEmpty(rightPartCategoryCode)) {
            log.error("leftPartCategoryCode or rightPartCategoryCode is null, cannot execute one many rule");
            throw new AlgLoaderException(
                    "leftPartCategoryCode or rightPartCategoryCode is null, cannot execute one many rule");

/**
 * еҰҜвҖіжҪЎз»ҫпёҪжҪ«йҺөСҶо”‘йҚЈг„Ҙз–„йҗңжү®иў«
 * зҖ№зӮөе№ҮModuleConstraintExecutorйҺәгғҘеҪӣй”ӣеұҫеҪҒжёҡж¶ҡе®ійҸүзҶёзң°з‘ҷпҪҮж®‘йҸҚзЁҝзёҫйҚ”зҶ»е…ҳ
 * 
 * @since 2025-09-22
 */
@Slf4j
public class ModuleConstraintExecutorImpl extends ModuleBaseConstraintExecutorImpl implements ModuleConstraintExecutor {

    private final Map<Long, Module> moduleMap = new HashMap<>();

    private final Map<Long, ModuleAlgClassLoader> moduleAlgClassLoaderMap = new HashMap<>();

    private ConstraintConfig config;

    @Override
    public Result<Void> init(final ConstraintConfig config) {
        this.config = config;
        log.info("Module constraint executor initialized");
        return Result.success(null);
    }

    @Override
    public final Result<Void> fini() {
        moduleAlgClassLoaderMap.clear();
        moduleMap.clear();
        log.info("Module constraint executor finalized");
        return Result.success(null);
    }

    @Override
    public final Result<Void> addModule(Long rootModuleId, Module... modules) {
        if (modules == null) {
            return Result.failed("modules is null");
        }
        for (Module m : modules) {
            if (m == null) {
                continue;
            }
            moduleMap.put(m.getId(), m);
            m.init();
            ModuleAlgClassLoader loader = ModuleAlgClassLoader.newInstance(config, m.getAlg());
            loader.init();
            moduleAlgClassLoaderMap.put(m.getId(), loader);
        }
        log.info("Added modules: {}", modules.length);
        return Result.success(null);
    }

    @Override
    public Result<Void> removeModule(Long moduleId) {
        moduleAlgClassLoaderMap.remove(moduleId);
        moduleMap.remove(moduleId);
        log.info("Removed module: {}", moduleId);
        return Result.success(null);
    }

    @Override
    public Result<List<ModuleInst>> doProcess(InferPartCategoryReq partCategoryReq) {
        return processProduct(module, partCategoryReq);
    }

    private Map<String, List<PartConstraintReq>> normalizePartConstraint(List<PartConstraintReq> orgReqs,
            IModule module) {
        Map<String, List<PartConstraintReq>> normalizedReqs = new HashMap<>();
        if (orgReqs == null) {
            return normalizedReqs;
        }
        for (PartConstraintReq orgReq : orgReqs) {
            List<PartConstraintReq> reqs = normalizedReqs.get(orgReq.getPartCategoryCode());
            if (reqs == null) {
                reqs = new ArrayList<>();
                normalizedReqs.put(orgReq.getPartCategoryCode(), reqs);
            }
            normalizedReqs.get(orgReq.getPartCategoryCode()).add(orgReq);
        }

        // йҸҚеӣ§еҷҜйҚ–ж өзҙқ 1йҠҶдҪ№зҳЎж¶“зҢәootCategoryйҚҷоҒ…ж№Ғ1ж¶“оҒҺзҙқ 2йҠҶдҪёзқҳжөңеәЎжӮ“ж¶“вӮ¬ж¶“зҢәootCategoryйҗЁеҮұartConstraintReqй”ӣеұҪжӮҺйӘһ
... (truncated)

package com.jmix.executor;

import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.Module;
import com.jmix.executor.impl.ModuleConstraintExecutorImpl;

import com.jmix.executor.model.InferParasReq;
import com.jmix.executor.model.ModulePostCalcReq;
import com.jmix.executor.cmodel.ModuleInst;
import com.jmix.executor.model.Result;

import java.util.List;

/**
 * еҰҜвҖіжҪЎз»ҫпёҪжҪ«йҺөСҶо”‘йҚЈг„Ҙеҙҹжёҡе¬¬иў«
 * йҺ»ж„Әз·өйҚҸг„Ҙзң¬з’Ғеқ—жЈ¶йҗҗзҷёзҙқжҫ¶ж ӯе„ҙйҚҷоҒҮе…ҳй–«ж°із№ғе§қгӮҶеёҙйҚҷпҪҲоҶ–й—ӮоҶје§ӣй‘і?
 * 
 * @since 2025-9-21
 */
public interface ModuleConstraintExecutor {

    /**
     * йҚҗе‘ҙе„ҙзҖ№зӮөе№ҮзҖ№зӮ°з·Ҙ
     */
    ModuleConstraintExecutorImpl INST = new ModuleConstraintExecutorImpl();

    /**
     * йҚ’жҝҶоқҗйҚ–ж ЁеўҪзҗӣеұҪж«’
     * 
     * @param config з»ҫпёҪжҪ«й–°е¶Үз–Ҷ
     * @return йҚ’жҝҶоқҗйҚ–ж «зІЁйҸӢ?
     */
    Result<Void> init(final ConstraintConfig config);

    /**
     * й–ҝвӮ¬е§ЈдҪ№еўҪзҗӣеұҪж«’
     * 
     * @return й–ҝвӮ¬е§ЈдҪәзІЁйҸӢ?
     */
    Result<Void> fini();

    /**
     * еЁЈиҜІе§һеҰҜвҖіжҪЎ
     * 
     * @param rootModuleId йҸҚи§„ДҒйҚ§жЎ°D
     * @param modules      еҰҜвҖіжҪЎйҸҒжү®зІҚ
     * @return еЁЈиҜІе§һзјҒж’ҙзҒү
     */
    Result<Void> addModule(Long rootModuleId, Module... modules);

    /**
     * з»үе©ҡж«ҺеҰҜвҖіжҪЎ
     * 
     * @param moduleId еҰҜвҖіжҪЎID
     * @return з»үе©ҡж«ҺзјҒж’ҙзҒү
     */
    Result<Void> removeModule(Long moduleId);

    /**
     * йҺәг„§жӮҠйҚҷеӮӣжҡҹй–°е¶Үз–Ҷй”ӣеұҫзүҙйҺ№оҮҖе„ҙжө еүҒж®‘й–°е¶Үз–ҶйҚҷе¶Ҷеё№йҚҷеӮӣжҡҹйҗЁеӢҜеҺӨзјғ?<br>
     * жҝЎеӮӣзҒүreq.enumerateAllSolution=falseй”ӣеұјзІҺжқ©ж–ҝжҙ–ж¶“вӮ¬ж¶“оҒ„еҪІзҗӣеІғР’й”ӣ?br>
     * жҝЎеӮӣзҒүreq.enumerateAllSolution=trueй”ӣеұҪеһҜжқ©ж–ҝжҙ–йҺөвӮ¬йҸҲеӨҢж®‘йҚҷоҲһвӮ¬еӨҺР’ <br>
     * 
     * @param req йҸҚи§„еөҒж¶“е©ҡе„ҙжө е •еҺӨзјғ?зҖ№зӮ°з·Ҙй”ӣеӨҠеј·йҚ“е¶Үз–ҶйҚҷеӮӣжҡҹйҚңеІ„е„ҙжө еүҒж®‘й–°е¶Үз–ҶйҚҷе¶Ҷеё№йҚҷеӮӣжҡҹй–°е¶Үз–ҶйҗЁеӢ«вӮ¬?
     * @return йҺәг„§жӮҠзјҒж’ҙзҒү
     *         жҝЎеӮӣзҒүйҸҲеӨҺР’й”ӣеұҪеһҜResult.SUCCESSй”ӣеӯҜesult.dataж¶“йёҝоҮӣзјҒе—ҷж®‘з‘ҷпҪҶжҡҹйҺ№?br>
     *         жҝЎеӮӣзҒүеЁҢв„ғж№Ғз‘ҷпҪҸзҙқйҚ’ж¬’з№‘йҚҘжҝәesult.NO_SOLUTION <br>
     *         жҝЎеӮӣзҒүйҺөСҶо”‘жқ©еӣ©в–јйҚ‘жҙӘж•Ҡй”ӣеұҪеһҜжқ©ж–ҝжҙ–Result.FAILED <br>
     */
    Result<List<ModuleInst>> inferParas(InferParasReq req);

    /**
     * йҗҷо„ӮзҸӣйҚҡеәЈз–Ҷз’Ғпј„з•»: зҖөз‘°еҮЎйҸҲеӨҺР’йҺөСҶо”‘CalcStage.POSTз‘ҷеӢ«еһҜй”ӣеұҪе•“йҚҘзӮҙж·ійҗўзҶ·еј¬йҸҒ?

     */
    Result<List<ModuleInst>> postCalculate(ModulePostCalcReq req);
}

/**

 * йҺ»ж„Әз·өзҖөзӯӮoduleInstж¶“о…ўе„ҙжө иәІвӮ¬дҪёзқҳйҺ¬СҒвӮ¬дҪёеј¬йҸҒжү®ж®‘з’ҮиҜІеҪҮйҚңеұҪе•“йҚҸгғЁе…ҳйҚ”?
 *
 * @since 2026-05-03
 */

    void setParaValue(String paraCode, String value);

    void setParaValue(String partCategoryCode, String paraCode, String value);

    void setParaValue(String partCategoryCode, int instId, String paraCode, String value);

    String getParaValue(String paraCode);

    int getQuantity(String partCategoryCode);

    int getQuantity(String partCategoryCode, int instId);

    List<Integer> getInstanceIds(String partCategoryCode);
}

package com.jmix.executor.impl;

import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.Module;
import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.Part;
import com.jmix.executor.cmodel.ModuleBaseInst;
import com.jmix.executor.cmodel.ModuleInst;
import com.jmix.executor.cmodel.ParaInst;
import com.jmix.executor.cmodel.PartCategoryInst;
import com.jmix.executor.cmodel.PartInst;
import com.jmix.executor.model.AlgLoaderException;

import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;

/**
 * ModuleInstAccessorзҖ№зӮөе№Үз»«?
 * йҚ©иҪ°з°¬ModuleеҰҜвҖізҖ·йҚңеӯ§oduleInstзҖ№зӮ°з·ҘйҺ»ж„Әз·өй–®г„Өж¬ўзҒһзӮҙвӮ¬СҶоҮ°йҚҷж §жӢ°йҚҷеӮӣжҡҹйҚҗж¬ҸеҸҶй‘іи—үе§Ҹ
 *
 * @since 2026-05-03
 */
@Slf4j
public class ModuleInstAccessorImpl implements ModuleInstAccessor {

    private final Module module;
    private final ModuleInst moduleInst;

    public ModuleInstAccessorImpl(Module module, ModuleInst moduleInst) {
        this.module = module;
        this.moduleInst = moduleInst;
    }

    // ==================== setParaValue ====================

    @Override
    public void setParaValue(String paraCode, String value) {
        ParaInst paraInst = findModuleParaInst(paraCode);
        paraInst.setValue(value);
    }

    @Override
    public void setParaValue(String partCategoryCode, String paraCode, String value) {
        PartCategoryInst pcInst = findPartCategoryInst(partCategoryCode, ModuleInst.DEFAULT_INSTANCE_ID);
        setParaValue(pcInst, paraCode, value);
    }

    @Override
    public void setParaValue(String partCategoryCode, int instId, String paraCode, String value) {
        PartCategoryInst pcInst = findPartCategoryInst(partCategoryCode, instId);
        setParaValue(pcInst, paraCode, value);
    }

    private void setParaValue(ModuleBaseInst baseInst, String paraCode, String value) {
        for (ParaInst pi : baseInst.getParas()) {
            if (paraCode.equals(pi.getCode())) {
                pi.setValue(value);
                return;
            }
        }
        throw new AlgLoaderException(
                "ParaInst not found for code: " + paraCode + " in " + baseInst.getCode());
    }

    // ==================== getParaValue ====================

    @Override
    public String getParaValue(String paraCode) {
        ParaInst pi = findModuleParaInst(paraCode);
        return pi.getValue();
    }

    @Override
    public String getParaValue(String partCategoryCode, String paraCode) {
        PartCategoryInst pcInst = findPartCategoryInst(partCategoryCode, ModuleInst.DEFAULT_INSTANCE_ID);
        return getParaValue(pcInst, paraCode);
    }

    @Override
    public String getParaValue(String partCategoryCode, int instId, String paraCode) {
        PartCategoryInst pcInst = findPartCategoryInst(partCategoryCode, instId);
        return getParaValue(pcInst, paraCode);
    }

    private String getParaValue(ModuleBaseInst baseInst, String paraCode) {
        for (ParaInst pi : baseInst.getParas()) {
            if (paraCode.equals(pi.getCode())) {
                return pi.getValue();
            }
        }
        throw new AlgLoaderException(
                "ParaInst not found for code: " + paraCode + " in " + baseInst.getCode());
    }

    // ==================== getDynAttr ====================

    @Override
    public String getDynAttr(String partCategoryCode, String attrCode) {
        return getDynAttr(partCategoryCode, ModuleInst.DEFAULT_INSTANCE_ID, attrCode);
    }

    @Override
    public String getDynAttr(String partCategoryCode, int instId, String attrCode) {
        List<PartInst> effectiveParts = getEffectiveParts(partCategoryCode, instId);
        if (effectiveParts.isEmpty()) {
            return null;
        }
        PartInst firstPart = effectiveParts.get(0);
        String attrValue = getPartAttrValue(firstPart.getCode(), attrCode);
        if (attrValue == null) {
            throw new AlgLoaderException(
                    "Attribute '" + attrCode + "' not found on part '" + firstPart.getCode() + "'");
        }
        return attrValue;
    }

    // ==================== getDynAttrValues ====================

    @Override
    public List<String> getDynAttrValues(String partCategoryCode, String attrCode) {
        return getDynAttrValues(partCategoryCode, ModuleInst.DEFAULT_INSTANCE_ID, attrCode);
    }

    @Override
    public List<String> getDynAttrValues(String partCategoryCode, int instId, String attrCode) {
        List<PartInst> effectiveParts = getEffectiveParts(partCategoryCode, instId);
        List<String> values = new ArrayList<>();
        for (PartInst partInst : effectiveParts) {
            String attrValue = getPartAttrValue(partInst.getCode(), attrCode);
            if (attrValue == null) {
                throw new AlgLoaderException(
                        "Attribute '" + attrCode + "' not fo
... (truncated)

package com.jmix.executor.cmodel;

import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonIgnore;
import com.google.common.base.Strings;

import lombok.Data;
import lombok.EqualsAndHashCode;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;

/**
 * еҰҜвҖіжҪЎзҖ№зӮ°з·Ҙз»«?
 * зҗӣг„§гҒҡеҰҜвҖіжҪЎйҗЁеӢӘз«ҙж¶“оҒ„еҸҝжөЈж’із–„жёҡе¬¶зҙқйҚ–е‘ӯжғҲйҚҷеӮӣжҡҹзҖ№зӮ°з·ҘйҚңеІ„е„ҙжө и·әз–„жёҡ?
 *
 * @since 2025-09-22
 */
@Data
@EqualsAndHashCode(callSuper = true)
public class ModuleInst extends ModuleBaseInst {

    /**
     * жҰӣжЁҝо…»зҖ№зӮ°з·Ҙй–°е¶Үз–ҶIDз”ҜжҗҒеҷә
     */
    public static final String DEFAULT_INSTANCE_CONFIG_ID = "0";

    /**
     * жҰӣжЁҝо…»йҸҒдјҙеҷәз”ҜжҗҒеҷә
     */
    public static final int DEFAULT_QUANTITY = 1;

    /**
     * еҰҜвҖіжҪЎID
     */
    private Long id;

    /**
     * зҖ№зӮ°з·Ҙй–°е¶Үз–ҶID
     */
    private String instanceConfigId = DEFAULT_INSTANCE_CONFIG_ID;

    /**
     * йҸҒдјҙеҷә
     */
    private Integer quantity = DEFAULT_QUANTITY;

    /**
     * й–®г„Өж¬ўйҚ’е—ҷиў«зҖ№зӮ°з·ҘйҚ’жҘ„гҖғ
     */
    private List<PartCategoryInst> partCategorys = new ArrayList<>();

    /**
     * жөјжЁәеҺӣз»ҫСғзқҳйҺ¬СғвӮ¬з…ҺеһӘзҗӣ?
     * е§ЈеҝҺйҮңз»ҫпёҪжҪ«йҗЁеӢ«вӮ¬?
     */
    private List<PriorityAttrValue> priorityAttrValues = new ArrayList<>();

    /**
     * жөјжЁәеҺӣз»ҫС„её“жҗҙеҝ“еҪҝ
     */
    private int prioritySortNo = 0;

    /**
     * жөјжЁәеҺӣз»ҫС…жӮЈйҚҡе қвӮ¬?
     * йҸҲвӮ¬йҚҡеәЈжӮЈйҚҡе ўж®‘йҚҠ?
     */
    private double priorityOverallValue = 0.0;

    /**
     * й‘ҫеі°еҪҮйҺөвӮ¬йҸҲеӨҗе„ҙжө и·әз–„жёҡе¬¶зҙҷиӨ°ж’іеў зҒһ?+ йҺөвӮ¬йҸҲеӨҠз“ҷPartCategoryInstйҗЁеӢҜе„ҙжө и®№зҙҡ
     *
     * @return йҺөвӮ¬йҸҲеӨҗе„ҙжө и·әз–„жёҡе¬ӘеһӘзҗӣ?
     */
    @JsonIgnore
    public List<PartInst> getAllParts() {
        List<PartInst> allParts = new ArrayList<>();
        // еЁЈиҜІе§һиӨ°ж’іеў зҒһеӮңж®‘й–®г„Өж¬ў
        allParts.addAll(getParts());
        // й–«жҺ‘з¶ҠеЁЈиҜІе§һйҺөвӮ¬йҸҲеӨҠз“ҷPartCategoryInstйҗЁеӢҜе„ҙжө ?
        for (PartCategoryInst partCategoryInst : partCategorys) {
            allParts.addAll(partCategoryInst.getAllParts());
        }
        return allParts;
    }

    /**
     * й‘ҫеі°еҪҮйҺөвӮ¬йҸҲеӨҗе„ҙжө и·әеһҺз»«иҜІз–„жёҡ?
     *
     * @return йҺөвӮ¬йҸҲеӨҗе„ҙжө и·әеһҺз»«иҜІз–„жёҡе¬ӘеһӘзҗӣ?
     */
    @JsonIgnore
    public List<PartCategoryInst> getAllPartCategorys() {
        List<PartCategoryInst> allPartCategorys = new ArrayList<>();
        for (PartCategoryInst partCategoryInst : partCategorys) {
            allPartCategorys.add(partCategoryInst);
            allPartCategorys.addAll(partCategoryInst.getAllPartCategorys());
        }
        return allPartCategorys;
    }

    /**
     * еЁЈиҜІе§һй–®г„Өж¬ўйҚ’е—ҷиў«зҖ№зӮ°з·Ҙ
     *
     * @param partCategoryInst й–®г„Өж¬ўйҚ’е—ҷиў«зҖ№зӮ°з·Ҙ
     */
    public void addPartCategoryInst(PartCategoryInst partCategoryInst) {
        partCategorys.add(partCategoryInst);
    }

    /**
     * йҸҚи§„еөҒй–®г„Өж¬ўжө пҪҮзҲңйҸҢгғЁоҮ—й–®г„Өж¬ўзҖ№зӮ°з·Ҙй”ӣе ңзІ йҺөвӮ¬йҸҲеӨҗе„ҙжө жңөи…‘йҸҢгғЁоҮ—й”ӣ?
     *
     * @param partCode й–®г„Өж¬ўжө пҪҮзҲң
     * @return й–®г„Өж¬ўзҖ№зӮ°з·Ҙй”ӣеұҪоӣ§йҸӢж»Җз¬үзҖӣжЁәж№ӘйҚ’ж¬’з№‘йҚҘзҖ—ull
     */
    @JsonIgnore
    public PartInst queryPart(String partCategoryCode, int instId, String partCode) {
        // йҚҸе қж№ӘиӨ°ж’іеў зҒһеӮӣз…ЎйҺө?
        if (Strings.isNullOrEmpty(partCategoryCode)) {
            return super.queryPart(partCode);
        }
        // йҚҰг„Ҙз¶ӢйҚ“е¶…зң°йҸҢгғҰеЈҳ
        for (PartCategoryInst partCategoryInst : partCategorys) {
            if (partCategoryInst.getCode().equals(partCategoryCode) && partCategoryInst.getInstanceId() == instId) {
                return partCategoryInst.queryPart(partCode);
            }
        }
        return null;
    }

    /**
     * еЁЈиҜІе§һжөјжЁәеҺӣз»ҫСғзқҳйҺ¬СғвӮ¬й—ҙдҝҠйҺӯоҲҡеҹҢзҖӣжҘғоғҒж¶“еҸүзҖҜеҜӨе“„ж«’
     * йҸҚз…ҺзҙЎй”ӣжӯ…As(CA:100,TA:200,....)й”ӣе®ҺttrCodeйҚҷж §еў ж¶“гӮ„з¶…йҗЁеӢ«гҒҮйҚҗж¬Ҹз“§з»—?
     *
     * @param sb зҖӣжҘғоғҒж¶“еҸүзҖҜеҜӨе“„ж«’
     */
    public void appendPriorityAttrValuesInfo(StringBuilder sb) {
        sb.append(" PO:").append(priorityOverallValue);
        sb.append(" PS:").append(prioritySortNo);
        if (priorityAttrValues == null || priorityAttrValues.isEmpty()) {
            return;
        }
        if (sb.length() > 0) {
            sb.append(",");
        }
        sb.append("PAs(");
        boolean first = true;
        for (PriorityAttrValue priorityAttrValue : priorityAttrValues) {
            if (!first) {
                sb.append(",");
            }
            String shortCode = toAttrShortCode(priorityAttrValue.getAttrCode());
            sb.append(shortCode).append(":").append(priorityAttrValue.getOptimalValue());
            first = false;
        }
        sb.append(")");
    }

     *

package com.jmix.executor.cmodel;

import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonIgnore;

import lombok.Data;
import lombok.EqualsAndHashCode;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;

/**
 * й–®г„Өж¬ўйҚ’е—ҷиў«зҖ№зӮ°з·Ҙз»«?
 * зҗӣг„§гҒҡй–®г„Өж¬ўйҚ’е—ҷиў«йҗЁеӢӘз«ҙж¶“оҒ„еҸҝжөЈж’із–„жёҡе¬¶зҙқйҚ–е‘ӯжғҲйҚҷеӮӣжҡҹзҖ№зӮ°з·ҘйҚңеІ„е„ҙжө и·әз–„жёҡ?
 *
 * @since 2025-01-XX
 */
@Data
@EqualsAndHashCode(callSuper = true)
public class PartCategoryInst extends ModuleBaseInst {

    /**
     * зҖӣж„°е„ҙжө и·әеһҺз»«иҜІз–„жёҡе¬ӘеһӘзҗӣ?
     */
    private List<PartCategoryInst> partCategorys = new ArrayList<>();

    /**
     * й–ҝж¬’оҮӨйҗ®дҫҠзҙқ0 зҗӣг„§гҒҡйҸғзҠ»ж•Ҡз’Ү?
     */
    private int errorCode = InstErrorCode.NO_ERROR;

    /**
     * й–ҝж¬’оҮӨеЁ‘е ҹдј…й”ӣеұҪеҜҳйҚҡоӮҘоҮӣзјҒе—ҷж®‘ж¶“е©Ғз¬…йҸӮеӣҰдҝҠйҺӯоҲӣжҹҹжёҡеһ®з•ҫжөЈ?
     */
    private String errorMessage;

    /**
     * й‘ҫеі°еҪҮйҺөвӮ¬йҸҲеӨҗе„ҙжө и·әз–„жёҡе¬¶зҙҷиӨ°ж’іеў зҒһ?+ йҺөвӮ¬йҸҲеӨҠз“ҷPartCategoryInstйҗЁеӢҜе„ҙжө и®№зҙҡ
     *
     * @return йҺөвӮ¬йҸҲеӨҗе„ҙжө и·әз–„жёҡе¬ӘеһӘзҗӣ?
     */
    @JsonIgnore
    public List<PartInst> getAllParts() {
        List<PartInst> allParts = new ArrayList<>();
        // еЁЈиҜІе§һиӨ°ж’іеў зҒһеӮңж®‘й–®г„Өж¬ў
        allParts.addAll(getParts());
        // й–«жҺ‘з¶ҠеЁЈиҜІе§һйҺөвӮ¬йҸҲеӨҠз“ҷPartCategoryInstйҗЁеӢҜе„ҙжө ?
        for (PartCategoryInst childCategoryInst : partCategorys) {
            allParts.addAll(childCategoryInst.getAllParts());
        }
        return allParts;
    }

    /**
     * й‘ҫеі°еҪҮйҺөвӮ¬йҸҲеӨҗе„ҙжө и·әеһҺз»«иҜІз–„жёҡ?
     *
     * @return йҺөвӮ¬йҸҲеӨҗе„ҙжө и·әеһҺз»«иҜІз–„жёҡе¬ӘеһӘзҗӣоҹ’зҙҷй–«жҺ‘з¶Ҡй‘ҫеі°еҪҮй”ӣ?
     */
    @JsonIgnore
    public List<PartCategoryInst> getAllPartCategorys() {
        List<PartCategoryInst> allPartCategorys = new ArrayList<>();
        for (PartCategoryInst childCategoryInst : partCategorys) {
            allPartCategorys.add(childCategoryInst);
            allPartCategorys.addAll(childCategoryInst.getAllPartCategorys());
        }
        return allPartCategorys;
    }

    /**
     * еЁЈиҜІе§һзҖӣж„°е„ҙжө и·әеһҺз»«иҜІз–„жёҡ?
     *
     * @param partCategoryInst й–®г„Өж¬ўйҚ’е—ҷиў«зҖ№зӮ°з·Ҙ
     */
    public void addPartCategoryInst(PartCategoryInst partCategoryInst) {
        partCategorys.add(partCategoryInst);
    }

    @Override
    public String toShortString(boolean isSimple, int instId) {
        if (errorCode != InstErrorCode.NO_ERROR) {
            String prefix = instId > 0 ? "I" + instId + "_" : "";
            return prefix + getCode() + ":" + InstErrorCode.toName(errorCode);
        }
        return super.toShortString(isSimple, instId);
    }

    /**
     * йҸҚи§„еөҒй–®г„Өж¬ўжө пҪҮзҲңйҸҢгғЁоҮ—й–®г„Өж¬ўзҖ№зӮ°з·Ҙй”ӣе ңзІ йҺөвӮ¬йҸҲеӨҗе„ҙжө жңөи…‘йҸҢгғЁоҮ—й”ӣ?
     *
     * @param partCode й–®г„Өж¬ўжө пҪҮзҲң
     * @return й–®г„Өж¬ўзҖ№зӮ°з·Ҙй”ӣеұҪоӣ§йҸӢж»Җз¬үзҖӣжЁәж№ӘйҚ’ж¬’з№‘йҚҘзҖ—ull
     */
    @Override
    public PartInst queryPart(String partCode) {
        // йҚҸе қж№ӘиӨ°ж’іеў зҒһеӮӣз…ЎйҺө?
        PartInst partInst = super.queryPart(partCode);
        if (partInst != null) {
            return partInst;
        }
        // йҚҰг„ҰеўҚйҸҲеӨҠз“ҷPartCategoryInstж¶“о…ҹз…ЎйҺө?
        for (PartCategoryInst childCategoryInst : partCategorys) {
            partInst = childCategoryInst.queryPart(partCode);
            if (partInst != null) {
                return partInst;
            }
        }
        return null;
    }
}

package com.jmix.executor.cmodel;

import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonIgnore;

import lombok.Data;
import lombok.NoArgsConstructor;

import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;

/**
 * й–®г„Өж¬ўзҖ№зӮ°з·Ҙз»«?
 * 
 * @since 2025-9-21
 */
@Data
@NoArgsConstructor
public class PartInst {

    /**
     * й–®г„Өж¬ўзјӮж «зҲң
     */
    private String code;

    /**
     * й–®г„Өж¬ўй–«еӨҗгҖҚйҚ’жҘ„гҖғй”ӣеІҖв”–зҗӣг„§гҒҡеЁҢв„ғж№Ғз’§е¬ӘвӮ¬?
     */
    private List<String> options;

    /**
     * йҸҒдјҙеҷә
     */
    private Integer quantity;

    /**
     * й–«еӨӢе«ЁзҒһзӮҙвӮ¬СғвӮ¬е…јж§§зҒҸ?
     */
    private Map<String, String> selectAttrValue;

    /**
     * йҸ„оҲҡжғҒй—…ж„ҜжЈҢ
     */
    private boolean isHidden = false;

    /**
     * йҸ„оҲҡжғҒй–«еӨүи…‘
     */
    private boolean isSelected = false;

    /**
     * йҺөв•ҒзқҚзҒһзӮҙвӮ¬?
     */
    private Map<String, Object> extAttrs;

    /**
     * йҗӯо… зҙӘйҗ®?жө е‘Ҝж•ӨжөңеәӨзҡҹз’Ү?
     */
    @JsonIgnore
    private String shortCode;

    public PartInst(String code, int quantity) {
        this.code = code;
        this.quantity = quantity;
    }

    /**
     * йҗўзҶёеһҡйҗӯо…һз“§з»—пёҝиҰҶзҗӣг„§гҒҡ
     *
     * @return йҗӯо…һз“§з»—пёҝиҰҶй”ӣеұјз·ҘжҝЎеӮҰзҙ°PT1(Q:20,H:0,S:1)
     */
    public String toShortString(boolean isSimple) {
        StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder();
        sb.append(shortCode != null ? shortCode : code).append("(");
        if (isSimple && (quantity == 0 && isSelected == false)) {
            // еЁЈиҜІе§һйҸҒдјҙеҷәж·Үв„ғдј…
            sb.append("0*");
        } else {
            // еЁЈиҜІе§һйҸҒдјҙеҷәж·Үв„ғдј…
            sb.append("Q:").append(quantity);
            sb.append(",H:").append(isHidden ? 1 : 0);
            // еЁЈиҜІе§һй–«еӨүи…‘йҗҳиҲөвӮ¬?
            sb.append(",S:").append(isSelected ? 1 : 0);
        }
        sb.append(")");
        return sb.toString();
    }
}

package com.jmix.executor.cmodel;

import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonIgnore;

import lombok.Data;

import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;

/**
 * йҚҷеӮӣжҡҹзҖ№зӮ°з·Ҙз»«?
 * зҗӣг„§гҒҡйҚҷеӮӣжҡҹйҗЁеӢӘз«ҙж¶“оҒ„еҸҝжөЈж’із–„жёҡе¬¶зҙқйҚ–е‘ӯжғҲйҚҷеӮӣжҡҹйҚҠз…ҺжӢ°й–«еӨҗгҖҚ
 * 
 * @since 2025-09-22
 */
@Data
public class ParaInst {

    /**
     * йҚҷеӮӣжҡҹзјӮж «зҲң
     */
    private String code;

    /**
     * йҚҷеӮӣжҡҹйҚҠзЎ·зҙқз»ҢйёҝгҖғз»Җзғҳз—…йҸҲеӨҺзҘҙйҚҠ?
     */
    private String value;

    /**
     * йҚҷеӮӣжҡҹй–«еӨҗгҖҚйҚ’жҘ„гҖғй”ӣеІҖв”–зҗӣг„§гҒҡеЁҢв„ғж№Ғз’§е¬ӘвӮ¬?
     */
    private List<String> options;

    /**
     * йҸ„оҲҡжғҒй—…ж„ҜжЈҢ
     */
    private boolean isHidden = false;

    /**
     * йҺөв•ҒзқҚзҒһзӮҙвӮ¬?
     */
    private Map<String, Object> extAttrs;

    /**
     * йҗӯо… зҙӘйҗ®?жө е‘Ҝж•ӨжөңеәӨзҡҹз’Ү?
     */
    @JsonIgnore
    private String shortCode;

    /**
     * йҗўзҶёеһҡйҗӯо…һз“§з»—пёҝиҰҶзҗӣг„§гҒҡ
     * 
     * @return йҗӯо…һз“§з»—пёҝиҰҶй”ӣеұјз·ҘжҝЎеӮҰзҙ°P1(V:1,H:0)
     */
    public String toShortString() {
        StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder();
        sb.append(shortCode != null ? shortCode : code).append("(");

        // еЁЈиҜІе§һйҚҠй—ҙдҝҠйҺӯ?
        if (value != null) {
            sb.append("V:").append(value);
        }

        // еЁЈиҜІе§һй—…ж„ҜжЈҢйҗҳиҲөвӮ¬?
        if (sb.length() > (shortCode != null ? shortCode : code).length() + 1) {
            sb.append(",");
        }
        sb.append("H:").append(isHidden ? 1 : 0);

        sb.append(")");
        return sb.toString();
    }

}

package com.jmix.executor.impl.algmodel;

import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.base.Programmable;

import com.google.ortools.sat.CpSolverSolutionCallback;

/**
 * й–«ж°ұж•ӨйҚҷж©ҖеҷәйҚ–е‘°о—ҠйҚЈоҹ’зҙқзјҒжҲқз•ҫйҚ’жқҝеҪІзјӮж «в–јеҰҜвҖізҖ·зҖөзЎ…и–„
 * йҺөвӮ¬йҸҲеӨҠеҪүй–Іеҝ•иў«йҚЁе¬¬ж®‘йҚ©иҷ№иў«
 * 
 * @param <T> йҚҷоҲңзҙӘз»Ӣе¬ӘоҮ®з’һпј„иў«йҚЁ?
 * @since 2025-09-22
 */
public abstract class Var<T extends Programmable> implements Programmable {
    /**
     * йҚ©иҷ№о”…зҖөзЎ…и–„
     */
    protected T base;

    /**
     * жҰӣжЁҝо…»йҸӢеӢҜвӮ¬зҠІеҡұйҸҒ?
     */
    protected Var() {
    }

    /**
     * з”Ҝп№ҖзҶҖзәӯвӮ¬зҖөзЎ…и–„йҗЁеӢ¬зҖҜй–«зҠІеҡұйҸҒ?
     * 
     * @param base йҚ©иҷ№о”…зҖөзЎ…и–„
     */
    protected Var(T base) {
        this.base = base;
    }

    /**
     * й‘ҫеі°еҪҮйҚ©иҷ№о”…зҖөзЎ…и–„
     * 
     * @return йҚ©иҷ№о”…зҖөзЎ…и–„
     */
    public T getBase() {
        return base;
    }

    /**
     * з’Ғеү§з–ҶйҚ©иҷ№о”…зҖөзЎ…и–„
     * 
     * @param base йҚ©иҷ№о”…зҖөзЎ…и–„
     */
    public void setBase(T base) {
        this.base = base;
    }

    @Override
    public String getCode() {
        return base != null ? base.getCode() : null;
    }

    /**
     * й‘ҫеі°еҪҮйҚҷж©ҖеҷәйҗЁеӢ«з“§з»—пёҝиҰҶзҗӣг„§гҒҡ
     * 
     * @param solutionCallback е§№еӮқР’йҚЈг„Ҙжҙ–з’Ӣ?
     * @return йҚҷж©ҖеҷәйҗЁеӢ«з“§з»—пёҝиҰҶзҗӣг„§гҒҡ
     */
    public String getVarString(CpSolverSolutionCallback solutionCallback) {
        return base != null ? base.getCode() : "";
    }

    /**
     * й‘ҫеі°еҪҮйҚҷж©ҖеҷәйҗЁеӢӯз•қйҗӯо…һз“§з»—пёҝиҰҶзҗӣг„§гҒҡ
     *

     */
    public String getShortString(CpSolverSolutionCallback solutionCallback) {
        return "";
    }
}

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.List;

 * 
 * @since 2025-09-22
 */
@Data
@EqualsAndHashCode(callSuper = true)
@Slf4j
public class PartVar extends Var<IPart> implements IExtensible, IDynamicAttributable {

    /**
     * й–®г„Өж¬ўйҸҒдјҙеҷәVarйҗЁеӢӯз…ӯйҚҡе¶ҮРһ
     */

    /**
     * йҸ„еү§гҒҡй—…ж„ҜжЈҢVarйҗЁеӢӯз…ӯйҚҡе¶ҮРһ
     */
    public static final String HIDDEN_SHORT_NAME = "H";

    /**
     * й–«еӨүи…‘VarйҗЁеӢӯз…ӯйҚҡе¶ҮРһ
     */
    public static final String ISSELECTED_SHORT_NAME = "S";

    /**
     * й–®г„Өж¬ўйҚҷж©ҖеҷәйҚӣи—үжӮ•еҰҜвҖізҙЎз”ҜжҗҒеҷә
     */
    public static final String VAR_PATTERN_PREFIX = "##Part.";

    /**
     * й–®г„Өж¬ўйҸҒдјҙеҷәVarйҗЁеӢ«жҮЎйҚҡе¶ҶДҒеҜ®?
     */
    public static final String QTY_PATTERN = VAR_PATTERN_PREFIX + "%s%s." + QTY_SHORT_NAME;

    /**

    public static final String HIDDEN_PATTERN = VAR_PATTERN_PREFIX + "%s%s." + HIDDEN_SHORT_NAME;
    /**

     */
    public static final String ISSELECTED_PATTERN = VAR_PATTERN_PREFIX + "%s%s." + ISSELECTED_SHORT_NAME;

    /**
     * зҖ№зӮ°з·ҘID
     */
    private int instId = ModuleInst.DEFAULT_INSTANCE_ID;

    /**
     * й–®г„Өж¬ўйҗЁеӢ¬жҡҹй–Іеҝ“вӮ¬?
     */

    /**
     * йҸ„еү§гҒҡй—…ж„ҜжЈҢзҒһзӮҙвӮ¬?
     */
    private BoolVar isHidden;

    /**
     * зҖӣж„°е„ҙжө и·әеһӘзҗӣ?
     */

    /**

        sb.append("PartVar{code=").append(getCode());

package com.jmix.executor.impl.algmodel;

import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.attr.DynamicAttributerOption;

import com.google.ortools.sat.BoolVar;
import com.google.ortools.sat.CpSolverSolutionCallback;

import lombok.Data;
import lombok.EqualsAndHashCode;

/**
 * йҚҷеӮӣжҡҹй–«еӨҗгҖҚйҚҷж©Җеҷә
 * йҗўг„Өз°¬зҗӣг„§гҒҡйҚҷеӮӣжҡҹй–«еӨҗгҖҚйҗЁеӢҜвӮ¬еӨүи…‘йҗҳиҲөвӮ¬дҪёжӢ°йҗ©зЁҝеҸ§ж·Үв„ғдј…
 * 
 * @since 2025-09-22
 */
@Data
@EqualsAndHashCode(callSuper = true)
public class ParaOptionVar extends Var<DynamicAttributerOption> {
    /**
     * йҚҷеӮӣжҡҹй–«еӨҗгҖҚйҗЁеӢҜвӮ¬еӨүи…‘йҗҳиҲөвӮ¬дҫҠзҙҷз”ҜеҶЁзҡөйҚҷж©Җеҷәй”ӣ?
     */
    private BoolVar isSelectedVar;

    public ParaOptionVar() {
    }

    /**
     * йҸӢеӢҜвӮ¬зҠІеҡұйҸҒ?
     * 
     * @param base йҚҷеӮӣжҡҹй–«еӨҗгҖҚйҚ©иҷ№о”…зҖөзЎ…и–„
     */
    public ParaOptionVar(DynamicAttributerOption base) {
        this.base = base;
    }

    /**
     * йҸӢеӢҜвӮ¬зҠІеҡұйҸҒ?
     * 
     * @param base          йҚҷеӮӣжҡҹй–«еӨҗгҖҚйҚ©иҷ№о”…зҖөзЎ…и–„
     * @param isSelectedVar й–«еӨүи…‘йҗҳиҲөвӮ¬дҪёеҪүй–І?
     */
    public ParaOptionVar(DynamicAttributerOption base, BoolVar isSelectedVar) {
        this.base = base;
        setIsSelectedVar(isSelectedVar);
    }

    /**
     * й‘ҫеі°еҪҮйҚҷеӮӣжҡҹй–«еӨҗгҖҚжө пҪҮзҲң
     * 
     * @return йҚҷеӮӣжҡҹй–«еӨҗгҖҚжө пҪҮзҲң
     */
    public String getCode() {
        return base != null ? base.getCode() : "";
    }

    /**
     * й‘ҫеі°еҪҮйҚҷеӮӣжҡҹй–«еӨҗгҖҚжө пҪҮзҲңID
     * 
     * @return йҚҷеӮӣжҡҹй–«еӨҗгҖҚжө пҪҮзҲңID
     */
    public int getCodeId() {
        return base != null ? base.getCodeId() : 0;
    }

    @Override
    public String getVarString(CpSolverSolutionCallback solutionCallback) {
        StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder();
        sb.append("ParaOption{code=").append(getCode());
        if (getIsSelectedVar() != null) {
            sb.append(", selected=").append(solutionCallback.value(getIsSelectedVar()));

        }
        sb.append("}");
        return sb.toString();
    }
}

        log.info("Built {} rule methods from module rules", ruleMethods.size());
        return ruleMethods;
    }

    protected void buildPriorityConstraint(IModule module) {
        module.getPriorityRules().forEach(rule -> buildPriorityConstraint(rule));
        for (Rule rule : module.getPriorityRules()) {
            buildPriorityConstraint(rule);
        }
    }

    /**
     * йҸӢеӢ«зј“жөјжЁәеҺӣз»ҫС…е®ійҸү?
     * 
     * @param rule з‘ҷеӢ«еһҜзҖөзЎ…и–„
     */
    protected void buildPriorityConstraint(Rule rule) {
        if (rule.getRawCode() == null || !(rule.getRawCode() instanceof PriorityRuleSchema)) {
            log.warn("Rule rawCode is not PriorityRuleSchema for rule: {}", rule.getCode());
            return;
        }
        PriorityConstraint pConstraint = new PriorityConstraint();
        pConstraint.setRule(rule);
        setPriorityConstraint(pConstraint);
    }

    /**
     * зҒҸе——еҪүй–Іеҝ“е•“йҚҘзӮІз“§еЁҲзўүзҙқж·ҮжҝҠзҳүз‘ҷеӢ«еһҜжөЈи·Ёж•ӨйҚҷж©ҖеҷәйҸ„оҲҡжӮ“ж¶“вӮ¬ж¶“?
     */
    protected void writeBackToFields(IModuleAlg moduleAlgFile) {
        Map<String, Field> fieldMap = getAllFieldVariables(moduleAlgFile);
        ModuleBaseAlgImpl algFileImpl = (ModuleBaseAlgImpl) moduleAlgFile;
        // жҫ¶еӢӯжӮҠPartVar
        for (Map.Entry<String, PartVar> entry : partMap.entrySet()) {
            String code = entry.getKey();
            PartVar partVar = entry.getValue();
            Field field = fieldMap.get(code);
            if (field != null) {
                Var<?> tVar = algFileImpl.newPartVar(partVar);
                setVariableField(moduleAlgFile, tVar, field);
            }
        }

        // жҫ¶еӢӯжӮҠParaVar
        for (Map.Entry<String, ParaVar> entry : paraMap.entrySet()) {
            String code = entry.getKey();
            ParaVar paraVar = entry.getValue();
            Field field = fieldMap.get(code);
            if (field != null) {
                Var<?> tVar = algFileImpl.newParaVar(paraVar);
                setVariableField(moduleAlgFile, tVar, field);
            }
        }
    }

    /**
     * йҺөСҶо”‘йҸҲо„Җзң°йҗЁеӢ®оқүйҚ’?
     *
     * @param allRuleMethods йҺөвӮ¬йҸҲеӨҺоқүйҚ’ж¬җжҹҹеЁүжӣҹж§§зҒҸ?
     */
    protected void executeModuleRules(IModuleAlg moduleAlgFile, Map<String, Method> allRuleMethods,
            CalcStage calcStage) {
        if (module == null || module.getAllRules() == null || allRuleMethods == null) {
            return;
        }

        List<Rule> moduleRules = module.getRules(calcStage);
        executeModuleRules(moduleRules, moduleAlgFile, allRuleMethods, calcStage);
    }

    /**
     * йҺөСҶо”‘йҸҲо„Җзң°йҗЁеӢ®оқүйҚ’?
     *
     * @param allRuleMethods йҺөвӮ¬йҸҲеӨҺоқүйҚ’ж¬җжҹҹеЁүжӣҹж§§зҒҸ?
     */
    protected void executeModuleRules(List<Rule> rules, IModuleAlg moduleAlgFile, Map<String, Method> allRuleMethods,
            CalcStage calcStage) {
        if (rules == null || allRuleMethods == null) {
            return;
        }
        for (Rule rule : rules) {
            String ruleCode = rule.getCode();
            Method method = allRuleMethods.get(ruleCode);
            if (method == null) {
                log.error("Rule method not found for rule code: {} in class {}", ruleCode, this.getClass().getName());
                throw new AlgLoaderException("Rule method not found for rule code: " + ruleCode + " in class "
                        + this.getClass().getName());
            }
            model.addRuleSeperator(ruleCode);
            setCurrentModule4Rule(moduleAlgFile, this);
            executeRuleMethod(rule, moduleAlgFile, method);
            setCurrentModule4Rule(moduleAlgFile, null);
        }
    }

    private void setCurrentModule4Rule(IModuleAlg moduleAlgFile, ModuleBaseAlgImpl tmpModuleAlg) {
        ModuleBaseAlgImpl algFileImpl = (ModuleBaseAlgImpl) moduleAlgFile;
        algFileImpl.currentModule = (tmpModuleAlg == null ? null : tmpModuleAlg.getModule());
        algFileImpl.currentModuleAlg = tmpModuleAlg;

    }

    protected void initData(AlgCPModel model, IModule module, IModuleInput moduleInput,
            IModuleAlg moduleAlgFile) {
        // Moduleз»ҫСғеҹҶ
        this.model = model;
        this.module = module;
        this.moduleInput = moduleInput;
        // йҚ’жҝҶоқҗйҚ–ж §еҗӢзҖ№и§„вӮ¬С…е®ійҸүзҶәз•»еЁүжӣһз–„жёҡ?
        this.compatibleConstraintAlg = new CompatibleConstraintAlg(model);
        initModelAfter(model);

        // йҚ’жҝҶоқҗйҚ–ж Ёж№°зҒһеӮҡеҪүй–ІеҝҘзҙҷparasйҚңе®Іartsй”ӣ?
        initAll(moduleAlgFile);
    }

    protected void initInput(IModuleAlg moduleAlgFile) {
        // зҒҸе——еҪүй–Іеҝ“е•“йҚҘзӮІз“§еЁҲ?
        writeBackToFields(moduleAlgFile);

        log.info("ModuleBaseAlgImpl initInput {}", module.getClass().getSimpleName());
    }

    public void initRules(Map<String, Method> allRuleMethods,

        // еЁЈиҫЁе«№з’җжҝӢвӮ¬еӨҗгҖҚйҚ’жҘ„гҖғ
        List<DynamicAttributerOption> copiedOptions = new ArrayList<>();
        for (DynamicAttributerOption option : original.getOptions()) {
            DynamicAttributerOption copiedOption = new DynamicAttributerOption();
            copiedOption.setCode(option.getCode());
            copiedOption.setCodeId(option.getCodeId());
            copiedOption.setCodeValue(option.getCodeValue());

    /**
     * йҸӢеӢ«зј“ModuleAlgArtifactзҖөзЎ…и–„
     * 
     * @param module         еҰҜвҖіжҪЎзҖөзЎ…и–„
     * @param moduleAlgClazz еҰҜвҖіжҪЎз» жҘҒзЎ¶з»«?
     * @return й–°е¶Үз–ҶжҝӮз•Ңж®‘ModuleAlgArtifactзҖөзЎ…и–„
     */
    private static ModuleAlgArtifact buildAlg(Module module, Class<?> moduleAlgClazz) {
        ModuleAlgArtifact alg = new ModuleAlgArtifact();
        alg.setId(module.getId());
        alg.setModuleCode(module.getCode());
        alg.setFileName(moduleAlgClazz.getName());
        alg.setPackageName(moduleAlgClazz.getPackage().getName());

        // еҰ«вӮ¬йҸҢгғҰж§ёйҚҡпёҝиҙҹйҚҗе‘ҙе„ҙз»«дјҷзҙқз’Ғеү§з–ҶparentClassName
        Class<?> enclosingClass = moduleAlgClazz.getEnclosingClass();
        if (enclosingClass != null) {
            // йҸ„оҲҡе”ҙй–®г„§иў«й”ӣеІғоҶ•зјғоҶҫеҹ—з»«иҜІжӮ•з»ү?
            alg.setParentClassName(enclosingClass.getSimpleName());
            log.info("Detected inner class: {}, parent class: {}", moduleAlgClazz.getName(),
                    enclosingClass.getName());
        } else {
            // ж¶“е¶Ҷж§ёйҚҗе‘ҙе„ҙз»«дјҷзҙқж·ҮжҝҮеҜ”жҰӣжЁҝо…»з»Ңе“„з“§з»—пёҝиҰҶ
            alg.setParentClassName("");
        }

        return alg;
    }

    /**
     * йҸӢеӢ«зј“еҰҜвҖіжҪЎйҚ©иҷ№о”…зҒһзӮҙвӮ¬?
     * 
     * @param module         еҰҜвҖіжҪЎзҖөзЎ…и–„
     * @param moduleAnno     еҰҜвҖіжҪЎеЁүг„ЁР’
     * @param moduleAlgClazz еҰҜвҖіжҪЎз» жҘҒзЎ¶з»«?
     */
    private static void buildModuleBase(Module module, ModuleAnno moduleAnno, Class<?> moduleAlgClazz) {
        // 1.1 йҗўзҶёеһҡModule.code
        String className = moduleAlgClazz.getSimpleName();
        // жөјжЁәеҜІжө пҪҮзҲңйҗўзҶёеһҡй–«жҳҸз·«й”ӣж°¬еҪ§йҚҳз»ҳеёҖйҸҲоӮўзҶ¬йҗЁ?Constraint"
        String code = className;
        if (className.endsWith("Constraint")) {
            code = className.substring(0, className.length() - "Constraint".length());
        }
        module.setCode(code);

        // 1.2 з’Ғеү§з–ҶйҚҸжңөзІ¬зҒһзӮҙвӮ¬?
        module.setId(moduleAnno.id());
        module.setPackageName(moduleAnno.packageName().isEmpty() ? moduleAlgClazz.getPackage().getName()
                : moduleAnno.packageName());
        module.setVersion(moduleAnno.version());
        module.setDescription(moduleAnno.description());
        module.setSortNo(moduleAnno.sortNo());
        module.setExtSchema(moduleAnno.extSchema());
    }

    /**
     * ж·ҮжҝҶз“ЁеҰҜвҖіжҪЎйҚ’зүҲжһғжө ?

     * @param resourcePath з’§еӢ¬з°®з’әоҲҡз·һ
     */
    private static void saveToFile(Module module, String resourcePath) {

package com.jmix.executor.impl.algmodel;

import com.jmix.executor.model.AlgLoaderException;

import com.google.ortools.Loader;
import com.google.ortools.sat.BoolVar;

import com.google.ortools.sat.CpModel;

 * зҖөз¬ҙpModelйҺәгғҘеҪӣйҗЁеӢ«зҡқз‘Ғе’ғзҙқзҖ№зӮөе№ҮйҚҷж©ҖеҷәеЁүг„Ҙе”Ҫз»ӣеӨҠзҡқз‘Ғ?
 * зҖ№зӮөе№ҮзҖөз¬ҙpModelйҺәгғҘеҪӣзҒҸдҪҪо—Ҡй”ӣеІҖиў«жөје…јзҘҙз’Үжӣҡе”¬йҗ®дҪҪзҡҹйҗўв•©odelйҗЁеӢӘе”¬йҗ®дҫҖе…ҳж¶“е¶үжё¶з‘•дҪ·ж…ЁйҸҖзҷёзҙҷжҝЎеӮҰзҙ°model.addBoolAnd)
 *
 * @since 2025-09-22
 */
@Slf4j
@Data
public class AlgCPModel {
    static {
        Loader.loadNativeLibraries();
    }

     */
    private int otherVarIndex = 0;

    /**
     * йҸ„оҲҡжғҒйҚҡоҲңж•ӨйҸүжғ§зҙұйҚҷж©Җеҷәз’ӢеҶӯзҳҜеҰҜвҖізҙЎ
     */
    private boolean isAttachRelax = false;

    /**
     * йҸүжғ§зҙұйҚҷж©ҖеҷәйҸ„зҠІзҡ зҗӣоҹ’зҙқй–ҝоҶ»иҙҹз‘ҷеӢ«еһҜйҚҡе¶ҮРһй”ӣеұҪвӮ¬й—ҙиҙҹйҸүжғ§зҙұйҚҷж©Җеҷә

    /**

    /**
     * иӨ°ж’іеў е§қпҪ…ж№ӘжөЈи·Ёж•ӨйҗЁеӢ¬жҫ—еҜ®ж¶ҳеҪүй–І?
     */
    private BoolVar currentRelaxVar = null;

    /**

package com.jmix.executor.impl.algmodel;

import com.google.ortools.sat.Constraint;
import com.google.ortools.sat.ConstraintProto;
import com.google.ortools.sat.Literal;

import lombok.Data;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;

/**
 * з”ҜпёҪжҫ—еҜ®ж¶ҳеҪүй–Іеҝ•ж®‘з»ҫпёҪжҪ«йҚ–е‘°о—Ҡз»«?
 * йҗўг„Өз°¬йҸҖоҲӣеҜ”з»ҫпёҪжҪ«йҚҗиҢ¬зҚҠз’ӢеҶӯзҳҜйҚ”зҶ»е…ҳ
 *
 * @since 2025-01-27
 */
@Slf4j
@Data
public class AlgCPConstraint {
    /**
     * йҚҳзҶ·оқҗCP-SATз»ҫпёҪжҪ«зҖөзЎ…и–„
     */
    private Constraint cpConstraint;

    /**
     * йҸүжғ§зҙұйҚҷж©Җеҷәй”ӣеІҖж•ӨжөңеәЈе®ійҸүзҶ·е•ҝз»җдҪҪзҡҹз’Ү?
     *
     * <p>
     * иӨ°ж’ҙжҫ—еҜ®ж¶ҳеҪүй–ІеҝҺиҙҹfalseйҸғи®№зҙқз»ҫпёҪжҪ«зҒҸе—ҡоқҰ"йҸҖзӮ¬жҫ—"й”ӣе ңз¬үеҜ®е“„еҹ—йҺөСҶо”‘й”ӣеӨӣзҙқ
     * жө еәӨвӮ¬еұҪеәңйҚ”в•„зҳ‘йҚ’оӮўоҮұй‘·еӯҳжЈӨз‘ҷпҪҮж®‘з»ҫпёҪжҪ«зјҒеӢ«жӮҺйҠҶеӮқз№–йҸ„оҲңе®ійҸүзҶ·е•ҝз»җдҪҪзҡҹз’Үжӣ ж®‘йҸҚзЁҝзёҫйҸҲе“„еҹ—йҠҶ?
     * </p>
     */
    private Literal relaxationVar;

    /**
     * йҸүжғ§зҙұйҚҷж©ҖеҷәйҚҡе¶ҮРһй”ӣеІҖж•ӨжөңеәӨзҡҹз’ҮжӣһжӢ°йҸғгғҘз№”з’Ғжқҝз¶Қ
     *
     * <p>
     * йҸүжғ§зҙұйҚҷж©ҖеҷәйҚҡе¶ҮРһй–«ж°¬зҲ¶йҚ–е‘ӯжғҲз»ҫпёҪжҪ«йҗЁеӢ¬зҲЈз’Үе—•дҝҠйҺӯоҲӨзҙқжёҡеӨёз°¬йҚҰг„Ҙе•ҝз»җдҪёеһҺйҸӢж„ӯжӨӮ
     * и№ҮоӮҰвӮ¬зҶ·з•ҫжөЈе¶үжЈ¶жЈ°жЁје®ійҸүзҶҙвӮ¬еӮҷз·ҘжҝЎеӮҰзҙ°"relax_constraint_rule_001"йҠҶ?
     * </p>
     */
    private String relaxationVarName = "";

    /**
     * з»ҫпёҪжҪ«йҚҡе¶ҮРһй”ӣеұҪоӣ§й”ӣжӯӣddGreaterOrEqual
     */
    private String name = "";

    /**
     * е®ёп№ҒгҖғжқҲжғ§зҙЎйҗЁеүҶtr
     */
    private String left = "";

    /**
     * йҺҝе¶„з¶”з»—?
     */
    private String operator = "";

    /**
     * йҚҷе® гҖғжқҲжғ§зҙЎйҗЁеүҶtr
     */
    private String right = "";

    /**
     * йҸүвҖІж¬ўж·Үв„ғдј…
     */
    private String ifMemo = "";

    /**
     * е®ёп№ҒгҖғжқҲжғ§зҙЎйҚҡе¶ҮРһ
     */

    /**
     * йҚҷе® гҖғжқҲжғ§зҙЎйҚҡе¶ҮРһ
     */
    private String rightName = "";

    public AlgCPConstraint(Constraint cpConstraint, Literal relaxationVar, String relaxationVarName) {
        this.cpConstraint = cpConstraint;
        this.relaxationVar = relaxationVar;
        this.relaxationVarName = relaxationVarName;

        if (relaxationVar != null && cpConstraint != null) {
            cpConstraint.onlyEnforceIf(relaxationVar.not());
        }
        log.info("Constraint created: {} with relaxation: {}", name, relaxationVarName);
    }

    /**
     * з’Ғеү§з–Ҷз»ҫпёҪжҪ«йҺөСҶо”‘йҸүвҖІж¬ў
     *
     * @param condition йҺөСҶо”‘йҸүвҖІж¬ў
     */
    public void onlyEnforceIf(Literal condition) {
        cpConstraint.onlyEnforceIf(condition);
        ifMemo += " if " + toNameString(condition);
        log.info("relax:{} -----AlgCPConstraint:onlyEnforceIf", relaxationVarName);
    }

    /**
     * ж¶“е¶Ҷж•®йҺёдҪәж®‘йҸӮи§„зЎ¶ - йҺ¶ж¶ҳеҡӯеҜ®еӮҡзҲ¶
     * 
     * @param builder йҸӢеӢ«зј“йҚЈ?
     */
    public AlgCPConstraint(ConstraintProto.Builder builder) {
        throw new UnsupportedOperationException("AlgCPConstraint does not support ConstraintProto.Builder constructor");
    }

    /**
     * ж¶“е¶Ҷж•®йҺёдҪәж®‘йҸӮи§„зЎ¶ - йҺ¶ж¶ҳеҡӯеҜ®еӮҡзҲ¶
     * 
     * @param lits зҖӣжҘ…жҪ°й–Іеҝ”жҡҹзјҒ?
     */
    public void onlyEnforceIf(Literal[] lits) {
        throw new UnsupportedOperationException("AlgCPConstraint does not support onlyEnforceIf with Literal array");
    }

    /**
     * й‘ҫеі°еҪҮз»ҫпёҪжҪ«з»ұгҲ зҙ©

     * @return з»ҫпёҪжҪ«з»ұгҲ зҙ©
     */
    public int getIndex() {
        return cpConstraint.getIndex();
    }

    /**
     * ж¶“е¶Ҷж•®йҺёдҪәж®‘йҸӮи§„зЎ¶ - йҺ¶ж¶ҳеҡӯеҜ®еӮҡзҲ¶

    public ConstraintProto.Builder getBuilder() {
        throw new UnsupportedOperationException("AlgCPConstraint does not support getBuilder method");
    }

    /**

     */
    public static String toNameString(Literal lit) {
        if (lit instanceof com.google.ortools.sat.BoolVar) {
            return ((com.google.ortools.sat.BoolVar) lit).getName();
        }
        if (lit instanceof com.google.ortools.sat.IntVar) {

                String inner = str.substring(4, str.length() - 1); // Remove "not(" and ")"
                int parenIndex = inner.indexOf('(');
                if (parenIndex > 0) {
                    return "!" + inner.substring(0, parenIndex); // Extract variable name before

package com.jmix.executor.impl.algmodel;

import com.google.ortools.sat.BoolVar;
import com.google.ortools.sat.IntVar;
import com.google.ortools.sat.LinearExpr;
import com.google.ortools.sat.LinearExprBuilder;

import lombok.Data;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;

import java.util.AbstractMap;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.Collections;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;

/**
 * з»ҫжҢҺвӮ¬СҶгҖғжқҲжғ§зҙЎйҸӢеӢ«зј“йҚЈг„ҘеҜҳз‘Ғе‘ӯж«’
 * йҗўг„Өз°¬з’әзҶ»йҮңйҸӢеӢ«зј“з»ҫжҢҺвӮ¬СҶгҖғжқҲжғ§зҙЎйҸғеүҒж®‘йҺөвӮ¬йҸҲеӨүдҝҠйҺӯоҲӨзҙқжёҡеӨёз°¬йҸғгғҘз№”з’Ғжқҝз¶ҚйҚңеІғзҡҹз’Ү?
 */
@Slf4j
@Data
public class AlgCPLinearExpr {

    private LinearExprBuilder builder;

    private List<Map.Entry<String, String>> terms;

    private String name;

    /**
     * йҸ„оҲҡжғҒз»Ң?
     *
     * @return
     */
    public boolean isEmpty() {
        return terms.isEmpty();
    }

    /**
     * йҚ’ж¶ҳзј“ж¶“вӮ¬ж¶“оҒ„еҜҳйҚҡоӮўеҙҹж¶“оҒҲгҖҚйҗЁеӢӯеҡҺйҺ¬СҶгҖғжқҲжғ§зҙЎ
     *
     * @param var         йҚҷж©Җеҷә
     * @param coefficient з»Ҝз»ҳжҡҹ
     * @return йҚ’ж¶ҳзј“йҗЁеҮҷlgCPLinearExpr
     */
    public static AlgCPLinearExpr term(AlgCPLinearExpr var, long coefficient) {
        AlgCPLinearExpr expr = new AlgCPLinearExpr("term_" + var.getName() + "_" + coefficient);
        expr.addExpr(var, coefficient);
        return expr;
    }

    /**
     * йҚ’ж¶ҳзј“ж¶“вӮ¬ж¶“оҒ„еҜҳйҚҡоӮўеҙҹж¶“оҒҲгҖҚйҗЁеӢӯеҡҺйҺ¬СҶгҖғжқҲжғ§зҙЎ
     *
     * @param var         йҚҷж©Җеҷә
     * @param coefficient з»Ҝз»ҳжҡҹ
     * @return йҚ’ж¶ҳзј“йҗЁеҮҷlgCPLinearExpr
     */
    public static AlgCPLinearExpr term(IntVar var, long coefficient) {
        AlgCPLinearExpr expr = new AlgCPLinearExpr("term_" + var.getName() + "_" + coefficient);
        expr.addTerm(var, coefficient);
        return expr;
    }

    /**
     * йҚ’ж¶ҳзј“ж¶“вӮ¬ж¶“оҒ„еҜҳйҚҡоӮўеҙҹж¶“оҒҲгҖҚйҗЁеӢӯеҡҺйҺ¬СҶгҖғжқҲжғ§зҙЎ
     *
     * @param var         йҚҷж©Җеҷә
     * @param coefficient з»Ҝз»ҳжҡҹ
     * @return йҚ’ж¶ҳзј“йҗЁеҮҷlgCPLinearExpr
     */
    public static AlgCPLinearExpr term(BoolVar var, long coefficient) {
        AlgCPLinearExpr expr = new AlgCPLinearExpr("term_" + var.getName() + "_" + coefficient);
        expr.addTerm(var, coefficient);
        return expr;
    }

    /**
     * зҖөз‘°оҳҝж¶“зӢқlgCPLinearExprе§№еӮҡжӢ°
     *
     * @param expressions з‘•дҪ№зң°йҚңеІҖж®‘зҗӣг„ЁжҸӘеҜ®еҝ”жҡҹзјҒ?
     * @return е§№еӮҡжӢ°йҚҡеәЈж®‘AlgCPLinearExpr
     */
    public static AlgCPLinearExpr sum(AlgCPLinearExpr... expressions) {
        AlgCPLinearExpr result = new AlgCPLinearExpr("sum_" + expressions.length + "_alg_exprs");
        for (AlgCPLinearExpr expr : expressions) {
            result.builder.add(expr.build());
            result.terms.add(new AbstractMap.SimpleEntry<>("+ (" + expr.toString() + ")", expr.getName()));
        }
        log.debug("Created sum expression with {} AlgCPLinearExpr terms", expressions.length);
        return result;
    }

    /**
     * зҖөз‘°оҳҝж¶“зӢқlgCPLinearExprе§№еӮҡжӢ°
     *
     * @param expressions з‘•дҪ№зң°йҚңеІҖж®‘зҗӣг„ЁжҸӘеҜ®еҝӣжіҰйҚҡ?
     * @return е§№еӮҡжӢ°йҚҡеәЈж®‘AlgCPLinearExpr
     */
    public static AlgCPLinearExpr sumAlgCP(Iterable<AlgCPLinearExpr> expressions) {
        AlgCPLinearExpr result = new AlgCPLinearExpr("sum_algcp_iterable_exprs");
        int count = 0;
        for (AlgCPLinearExpr expr : expressions) {
            result.builder.add(expr.build());
            result.terms.add(new AbstractMap.SimpleEntry<>("+ (" + expr.toString() + ")", expr.getName()));
            count++;
        }
        log.debug("Created sum expression with {} AlgCPLinearExpr terms from iterable", count);
        return result;
    }

    /**
     * йҚ’ж¶ҳзј“з”ҜжҗҒеҷәзҗӣг„ЁжҸӘеҜ®?
     *
     * @param value з”ҜжҗҒеҷәйҚҠ?
     * @return з”ҜжҗҒеҷәAlgCPLinearExpr
     */
    public static AlgCPLinearExpr constant(long value) {
        AlgCPLinearExpr expr = new AlgCPLinearExpr("constant_" + value);
        expr.addConstant(value);
        return expr;
    }

    /**
     * йҚ’ж¶ҳзј“зјӮв•Ӯж–Ғзҗӣг„ЁжҸӘеҜ®?
     *
     * @param var   йҚҷж©Җеҷә
     * @param scale зјӮв•Ӯж–ҒйҚҘзҠІз“ҷ
     * @return зјӮв•Ӯж–ҒйҚҡеәЈж®‘AlgCPLinearExpr
     */
    public static AlgCPLinearExpr scaled(IntVar var, long scale) {
        return term(var, scale);
    }

    /**
     * йҚ’ж¶ҳзј“зјӮв•Ӯж–Ғзҗӣг„ЁжҸӘеҜ®?
     *

     */
    public static AlgCPLinearExpr scaled(BoolVar var, long scale) {
        return term(var, scale);
    }

    /**
     * йҚ’ж¶ҳзј“з”ҜпёҪжҪҲй–Іе¶Үж®‘е§№еӮҡжӢ°зҗӣг„ЁжҸӘеҜ®?

     * @return йҚ”зҠіжҪҲе§№еӮҡжӢ°йҗЁеҮҷlgCPLinearExpr
