package com.jmix.coretest;

import static org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertEquals;
import static org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertTrue;

import com.jmix.executor.ModuleConstraintExecutor;
import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.AttrPara;
import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.AttrParaType;
import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.IPart;
import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.Module;
import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.para.Para;
import com.jmix.executor.cmodel.DiagnosticConstraint;
import com.jmix.executor.cmodel.ModuleInst;
import com.jmix.executor.cmodel.ParaInst;
import com.jmix.executor.cmodel.PartInst;
import com.jmix.executor.cmodel.SolverResult;
import com.jmix.executor.impl.ModuleConstraintExecutorImpl;
import com.jmix.executor.impl.SolutionUtils;
import com.jmix.executor.impl.algmodel.ModuleAlgImpl;
import com.jmix.executor.impl.util.CommHelper;
import com.jmix.executor.impl.util.ParaTypeHandler;
import com.jmix.executor.model.AlgLoaderException;
import com.jmix.executor.model.ConstraintConfig;
import com.jmix.executor.model.InferParasReq;
import com.jmix.executor.model.PartConstraintReq;
import com.jmix.executor.model.Result;
import com.jmix.executor.model.StrategyConfig;
import com.jmix.executor.model.StrategyType;
import com.jmix.tool.bbuilder.ModuleGenneratorByAnno;
import com.jmix.tool.impl.ModulePacker;

import lombok.Data;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;

import org.junit.jupiter.api.AfterEach;
import org.junit.jupiter.api.BeforeEach;

import java.io.File;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.Optional;
import java.util.regex.Matcher;
import java.util.regex.Pattern;

/**
 * еҰҜвҖіжҪЎйҚҰзғҳж«ҷеЁҙе¬ӯзҳҜйҚ©иҷ№иў«
 * 
 * @since 2025-09-22
 */
@Slf4j
@Data
public abstract class ModuleScenarioTestBase {

    /**
     * з»ҫпёҪжҪ«з» жҘҒзЎ¶з»«?
     */
    private Class<? extends ModuleAlgImpl> constraintAlgClazz;

    /**
     * ж¶“еӯҳжӨӮз’§еӢ¬з°®з’әоҲҡз·һ
     */
    private String tempResourcePath = "";

    /**
     * еҰҜвҖіжҪЎ
     */
    private Module module;

    /**
     * й–°е¶Үз–Ҷ
     */
    protected ConstraintConfig cfg;

    /**
     * з‘ҷпҪ…е–…йҸӮи§„о”ҚйҚ’жҘ„гҖғ
     */
    private List<ModuleInst> solutions = new ArrayList<>();

    /**
     * йҺәг„§жӮҠзјҒж’ҙзҒү
     */
    private Result<List<ModuleInst>> result;

    /**
     * йҸ„оҲҡжғҒйҸӢж°«еҰҮйҺөвӮ¬йҸҲеӨҺР’йҚҗиҷ«жҹҹеҰ—?
     */
    private boolean enumerateAllSolution = true;

    /**
     * йҸӢеӢҜвӮ¬зҠІеҡұйҸҒ?
     * 
     * @param constraintAlgClazz з»ҫпёҪжҪ«з» жҘҒзЎ¶з»«?
     */
    public ModuleScenarioTestBase(Class<? extends ModuleAlgImpl> constraintAlgClazz) {
        this.constraintAlgClazz = constraintAlgClazz;
    }

    /**
     * е§ЈеҝҺйҮңйҗўг„Өз·ҘйҺөСҶо”‘йҚ“е¶Ҳзҡҹйҗў?
     */
    @BeforeEach
    public void setUp() {
        init();
    }

    /**
     * е§ЈеҝҺйҮңйҗўг„Өз·ҘйҺөСҶо”‘йҚҡеәӨзҡҹйҗў?
     */
    @AfterEach
    public void tearDown() {
        ModuleConstraintExecutor.INST.fini();
    }

    /**
     * йҸӢеӢ«зј“ModuleйҸҒзүҲеөҒ
     * 
     * @param moduleAlgClazz еҰҜвҖіжҪЎз» жҘҒзЎ¶з»«?
     * @return йҸӢеӢ«зј“йҗЁеӢ¬ДҒйҚ§?
     */
    protected Module buildModule(Class<? extends ModuleAlgImpl> moduleAlgClazz) {
        // й–«ж°із№ғеЁүг„ЁР’йҗўзҶёеһҡModule
        module = ModuleGenneratorByAnno.build(moduleAlgClazz, tempResourcePath);
        return module;
    }

    /**
     * йҚ’жҝҶоқҗйҚ–ж ЁзҘҙз’Үжӣ е№Ҷжҫ§еҶҝзҙҷйҺөж’іеҜҳеҰҜвҖізҙЎй”ӣ?
     * 
     */
    protected void init() {
        // йҗўзҶёеһҡж¶“еӯҳжӨӮз’§еӢ¬з°®з’әоҲҡз·һ
        setTempResourcePath(CommHelper.createTempPath(getConstraintAlgClazz()));

        // жөЈи·Ёж•ӨйҚ—жӣҡз·Ҙз’Ғеқ—жЈ¶
        ConstraintConfig config = new ConstraintConfig();
        config.setAttachedDebug(true); // еЁҙе¬ӯзҳҜйҗңоҲҡо•Ёйҗ©еӯҳеёҙжөЈи·Ёж•ӨиӨ°ж’іеў classpathйҚ”зҠәжөҮ
        // config.setRootFilePath(getTempResourcePath());

package com.jmix.tool.packtest;

import com.jmix.coretest.ModuleScenarioTestBase;
import com.jmix.executor.model.ConstraintConfig;
import com.jmix.scenario.hello.HelloConstraint;

import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;

import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;

/**
 * жҫ¶ж°ӯжһғжө иҲөеўҰйҚ–е‘®зҘҙз’Ү?
 * зҖөз¬»elloConstraintжқ©ж¶ңо”‘йҺөж’іеҜҳйҚ”зҠәжөҮй”ӣеІғз№ҚзҗӣеұҪеҸҫж¶“о… ж•Өжёҡ?
 * 
 * @since 2025-09-27
 */
@Slf4j
public class MultiFilePackerTest extends ModuleScenarioTestBase {

    /**
     * йҸӢеӢҜвӮ¬зҮӨultiFilePackerTestеЁҙе¬ӯзҳҜз»«?
     */
    public MultiFilePackerTest() {
        super(HelloConstraint.class);
    }

    @Override
    protected void beforeInitConfig(ConstraintConfig cfg) {
        cfg.setLoadType(ConstraintConfig.LOAD_TYPE_FULL);
        cfg.setAttachedDebug(false); // йҺөж’іеҜҳеҰҜвҖізҙЎ
    }

    /**
     * еЁҙе¬ӯзҳҜйҚҷоҒ…ж№Ғж¶“вӮ¬ж¶“оҒҮР’йҗЁеӢ¬е„ҸйҚҗ?
     */
    @Test
    public void testOnlyOneSolution() {
        // еЁҙе¬ӯзҳҜжЈ°ж»ҶеЈҠйҚҷеӮӣжҡҹйҺәг„§жӮҠ
        inferParas("tShirt11", 1);

        // жөЈи·Ёж•ӨresultAssertжҘ еІғзҳүйҺөСҶо”‘зјҒж’ҙзҒү
        resultAssert()
                .assertSuccess()
                .assertSolutionSizeEqual(1);
    }
}
package com.jmix.tool.packtest;

import com.jmix.coretest.ModuleScenarioTestBase;
import com.jmix.executor.model.ConstraintConfig;
import com.jmix.scenario.ruletest.ParaIsHiddenTest;

import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;

import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;

/**
 * йҚ—жӣҹжһғжө иҲөеўҰйҚ–е‘®зҘҙз’Ү?
 * зҖөзӯҶaraIsHiddenTestжқ©ж¶ңо”‘йҺөж’іеҜҳйҚ”зҠәжөҮй”ӣеІғз№ҚзҗӣеұҪеҸҫж¶“о… ж•Өжёҡ?
 * 
 * @since 2025-09-27
 */
@Slf4j
public class SingleFilePackerTest extends ModuleScenarioTestBase {

    /**
     * йҸӢеӢҜвӮ¬зҮ¬ingleFilePackerTestеЁҙе¬ӯзҳҜз»«?
     */
    public SingleFilePackerTest() {
        super(ParaIsHiddenTest.ParaIsHiddenConstraint.class);
    }

    @Override
    protected void beforeInitConfig(ConstraintConfig cfg) {
        cfg.setLoadType(ConstraintConfig.LOAD_TYPE_FULL);
        cfg.setAttachedDebug(false); // йҺөж’іеҜҳеҰҜвҖізҙЎ
    }

    /**
     * еЁҙе¬ӯзҳҜp2йҚ’зҡғart1йҗЁеӢ¬её№йҗһ?
     */
    @Test
    public void testp2Topart1() {
        // Test when p0=0, p1 should be hidden and p1.var=0
        inferParasByPara("p0", "1", "p2", "2");
        printSolutions();
        resultAssert()
                .assertSuccess()
                .assertSolutionSizeEqual(1);
    }
}

- ж—§жөӢиҜ•з®—жі•ж”№дёәз»§жүҝ `ConstraintAlgBase`пјҢеҸҳйҮҸж”№з”Ё `southinf.var` facadeгҖӮ

- `ModulePacker` / `ModuleAlgClassLoader` дёҚеҶҚзЎ¬зј–з Ғжү“еҢ…жҲ–еҠ иҪҪ `ConstraintAlgImplTestBase`гҖӮ
- Hello World з”ЁдҫӢе·Іжү“ејҖе№¶йҖҡиҝҮпјҢ`src/test/resources/algroot/cp-Hello-123` дёӢзҡ„ jar/base/source д№ҹе·ІеҲ·ж–°дёәж–°еҚ—еҗ‘ API зүҲжң¬гҖӮ
- RFC-0005 ж–ҮжЎЈзҡ„е®һж–ҪзҠ¶жҖҒе·ІеҗҢжӯҘжӣҙж–°гҖӮ

йӘҢиҜҒпјҡ
- `mvn test` е…ЁйҮҸйҖҡиҝҮ
- `ExecutorSampleTest#helloSample` еҚ•зӢ¬йҖҡиҝҮ

е·ІжҺЁйҖҒпјҡ
- еҲҶж”Ҝпјҡ`feature/rfc-0005-south-interface-decoupling`
- жҸҗдәӨпјҡ`d91ba74 test(rfc): migrate legacy tests to southbound API`

`.specstory` зҡ„жң¬ең°ж”№еҠЁжІЎжңүжҸҗдәӨгҖӮ
